paragraphs.source: Co-Packaged Optics (CPO) has long promised to transform datacenter connectivity, but it has taken a long time for the technology to come to market, with tangible deployment-ready products only arriving in 2025. In the meantime, pluggable transceivers have kept pace with networking requirements and remain the default path thanks to their relative cost-effectiveness, familiarity in deployment, and standards-based interoperability.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Co-Packaged Optics (CPO) has long promised to transform datacenter connectivity, but it has taken a long time for the technology to come to market, with tangible deployment-ready products only arriving in 2025. In the meantime, pluggable transceivers have kept pace with networking requirements and remain the default path thanks to their relative cost-effectiveness, familiarity in deployment, and standards-based interoperability.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Co-Packaged Optics (CPO) has long promised to transform datacenter connectivity, but it has taken a long time for the technology to come to market, with tangible deployment-ready products only arriving in 2025. In the meantime, pluggable transceivers have kept pace with networking requirements and remain the default path thanks to their relative cost-effectiveness, familiarity in deployment, and standards-based interoperability.

default.text: 光电共封装（CPO）技术长期以来被寄予重塑数据中心互连的厚望，但其走向市场耗时漫长，直到 2025 年才出现真正可部署的实体产品。在此期间，可插拔光模块紧跟网络需求演进。得益于相对较高的性价比、成熟的部署经验以及基于标准的互操作性，它依然是业界的默认路径。

paragraphs.source: However the heavy networking demands that come with AI workloads mean that this time is different. The AI networking bandwidth roadmap is such that interconnect speed, range, density and reliability requirements, will soon outpace what transceivers can provide. CPO will provide some benefit and bring more options to scale-out networking, but it will be central to scale-up networking. CPO will be the main driver of bandwidth increases in scale-up networking for the latter part of this decade and beyond.

inline_elements.text: CPO will be the main driver of bandwidth increases in scale-up networking for the latter part of this decade and beyond.

paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: However the heavy networking demands that come with AI workloads mean that this time is different. The AI networking bandwidth roadmap is such that interconnect speed, range, density and reliability requirements, will soon outpace what transceivers can provide. CPO will provide some benefit and bring more options to scale-out networking, but it will be central to scale-up networking. **CPO will be the main driver of bandwidth increases in scale-up networking for the latter part of this decade and beyond.**
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: However the heavy networking demands that come with AI workloads mean that this time is different. The AI networking bandwidth roadmap is such that interconnect speed, range, density and reliability requirements, will soon outpace what transceivers can provide. CPO will provide some benefit and bring more options to scale-out networking, but it will be central to scale-up networking. CPO will be the main driver of bandwidth increases in scale-up networking for the latter part of this decade and beyond.

parent_inline_elements.text: CPO will be the main driver of bandwidth increases in scale-up networking for the latter part of this decade and beyond.

default.text: 然而，AI 工作负载带来的海量网络需求意味着，这一次情况截然不同。根据 AI 网络带宽的发展路线，互连在速度、传输距离、密度和可靠性方面的需求，很快将全面超越可插拔光模块的承载极限。CPO 将为横向扩展网络带来一定增益与更多选择，但它必将成为纵向扩展网络的核心。在 2020 年代后期乃至更长远的未来，CPO 将成为纵向扩展网络带宽增长的主要驱动力。
default.tokenized_text: 然而，AI 工作负载带来的海量网络需求意味着，这一次情况截然不同。根据 AI 网络带宽的发展路线，互连在速度、传输距离、密度和可靠性方面的需求，很快将全面超越可插拔光模块的承载极限。CPO 将为横向扩展网络带来一定增益与更多选择，但它必将成为纵向扩展网络的核心。[[[STRONG_1|在 2020 年代后期乃至更长远的未来，CPO 将成为纵向扩展网络带宽增长的主要驱动力。]]]

paragraphs.source: Today’s copper-based scale-up solutions, such as NVLink, provide tremendous bandwidth of 7.2 Tbit/s per GPU – soon to be 14.4 Tbit/s per GPU in the Rubin generation, yet copper-based links are limited in range to two meters at most, meaning the scale-up domain world size is limited to one or two racks at most. It is also increasingly difficult to scale bandwidth over copper. In Rubin, Nvidia will deliver another doubling of bandwidth per copper lane through bi-directional SerDes, but doubling bandwidth on copper by developing ever-faster SerDes is a highly challenging vector of scaling that is a slow grind. CPO can deliver the same or better bandwidth density and can provide additional vectors for scaling bandwidth, all while enabling larger scale-up domains.

inline_elements.text: CPO can deliver the same or better bandwidth density and can provide additional vectors for scaling bandwidth, all while enabling larger scale-up domains.

It is also increasingly difficult to scale bandwidth over copper. default.text: 如今，基于铜缆的纵向扩展解决方案（如 NVLink）可提供每 GPU 7.2 Tbit/s 的超高带宽——在 Rubin 架构中很快将达到每 GPU 14.4 Tbit/s。然而，铜缆链路的传输距离最多不超过两米，这意味着纵向扩展域的规模最多只能覆盖一到两个机架。此外，在铜缆上继续扩展带宽也愈发困难。在 Rubin 架构中，英伟达（NVIDIA）将通过双向 SerDes 技术，实现单条铜缆通道带宽的再次翻倍。但依靠研发更快的 SerDes 来实现铜缆带宽翻倍，是一条极具挑战且进展缓慢的扩展路径。CPO 能够提供相同甚至更高的带宽密度，为带宽扩展提供更多维度，同时还能支持更大规模的纵向扩展域。
default.tokenized_text: 如今，基于铜缆的纵向扩展解决方案（如 NVLink）可提供每 GPU 7.2 Tbit/s 的超高带宽——在 Rubin 架构中很快将达到每 GPU 14.4 Tbit/s。然而，铜缆链路的传输距离最多不超过两米，这意味着纵向扩展域的规模最多只能覆盖一到两个机架。此外，在铜缆上继续扩展带宽也愈发困难。在 Rubin 架构中，英伟达（NVIDIA）将通过双向 SerDes 技术，实现单条铜缆通道带宽的再次翻倍。但依靠研发更快的 SerDes 来实现铜缆带宽翻倍，是一条极具挑战且进展缓慢的扩展路径。[[[STRONG_1|CPO 能够提供相同甚至更高的带宽密度，为带宽扩展提供更多维度，同时还能支持更大规模的纵向扩展域。]]]

paragraphs.source: A starting point for understanding the impetus for CPO is to consider the many inefficiencies and trade-offs when using a transceiver for optical communication. Transceivers can be used to achieve greater link range, but the cage on the front panel of a networking switch or compute tray that transceivers plug into is typically situated 15-30cm from an XPU or switch ASIC. This means that signals must first be transmitted electrically using an LR SerDes over that 15-30cm distance, with the electrical signal recovered and conditioned by a Digital Signal Processor (DSP) within the transceiver before being converted into an optical signal.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: A starting point for understanding the impetus for CPO is to consider the many inefficiencies and trade-offs when using a transceiver for optical communication. Transceivers can be used to achieve greater link range, but the cage on the front panel of a networking switch or compute tray that transceivers plug into is typically situated 15-30cm from an XPU or switch ASIC. This means that signals must first be transmitted electrically using an LR SerDes over that 15-30cm distance, with the electrical signal recovered and conditioned by a Digital Signal Processor (DSP) within the transceiver before being converted into an optical signal. With CPO, optical engines are instead placed next to XPUs or Switch ASICs, meaning that the DSP can be eliminated and that lower power SerDes can be used to move data from the XPU to the Optical Engine. This can reduce energy required to transmit data by more than 50% when compared to DSP Transceivers - with many aspiring to reduce energy requirements per bit by as much as 80%.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: A starting point for understanding the impetus for CPO is to consider the many inefficiencies and trade-offs when using a transceiver for optical communication. Transceivers can be used to achieve greater link range, but the cage on the front panel of a networking switch or compute tray that transceivers plug into is typically situated 15-30cm from an XPU or switch ASIC. This means that signals must first be transmitted electrically using an LR SerDes over that 15-30cm distance, with the electrical signal recovered and conditioned by a Digital Signal Processor (DSP) within the transceiver before being converted into an optical signal. With CPO, optical engines are instead placed next to XPUs or Switch ASICs, meaning that the DSP can be eliminated and that lower power SerDes can be used to move data from the XPU to the Optical Engine. This can reduce energy required to transmit data by more than 50% when compared to DSP Transceivers - with many aspiring to reduce energy requirements per bit by as much as 80%.

default.text: 要理解发展 CPO 的驱动力，首先需要审视传统光收发器在光通信中存在的诸多低效与妥协。光收发器固然能延长链路传输距离，但其插入的网络交换机或计算托盘前面板插槽，通常距离 XPU 或交换芯片 15 至 30 厘米。这意味着，信号必须先通过 LR SerDes 跨越这 15 至 30 厘米的距离进行电传输。随后，电信号需由收发器内置的数字信号处理器（DSP）进行恢复与调理，最后才能转换为光信号。

paragraphs.source: With CPO, optical engines are instead placed next to XPUs or Switch ASICs, meaning that the DSP can be eliminated and that lower power SerDes can be used to move data from the XPU to the Optical Engine. This can reduce energy required to transmit data by more than 50% when compared to DSP Transceivers - with many aspiring to reduce energy requirements per bit by as much as 80%.

default.text: 采用 CPO 技术后，光引擎改为紧邻 XPU 或交换芯片部署。这意味着可以省去 DSP，并使用低功耗 SerDes 将数据从 XPU 传输至光引擎。与内置 DSP 的光收发器相比，这能将数据传输能耗降低 50% 以上，许多厂商甚至致力于将每比特能耗降低高达 80%。

paragraphs.source: While scale-out CPO solutions like Nvidia and Broadcom’s are garnering more attention and are being closely looked at by end customers, major Hyperscalers are already starting to plan out their scale-up CPO strategy and are committing to suppliers. For instance, Celestial AI is estimating that they could generate a $1B revenue run rate by the end of calendar year 2028 - we believe this will primarily be driven by a CPO scale-up solution shipping with Amazon’s Trainium 4.

inline_elements.text: Celestial AI is estimating that they could generate a $1B revenue run rate by the end of calendar year 2028

For instance, [Celestial AI is estimating that they could generate a $1B revenue run rate by the end of calendar year 2028](https://d1io3yog0oux5.cloudfront.net/_a2ff1b1766821fdbdf60a17efbf050dd/marvell/files/pages/marvell/db/3831/description/2025-12_02-Marvell-to-Acquire-Celestial-AI-vF2.pdf) - we believe this will primarily be driven by a CPO scale-up solution shipping with Amazon’s Trainium 4.

default.text: 尽管英伟达（NVIDIA）和博通的横向扩展（scale-out）CPO 解决方案备受瞩目，且正接受终端客户的密切评估，但头部云厂商已着手规划纵向扩展（scale-up）CPO 战略，并向供应商做出采购承诺。例如，Celestial AI 预计到 2028 年底其年化营收将达到 10 亿美元——我们认为，这主要得益于搭载亚马逊 Trainium 4 出货的纵向扩展 CPO 解决方案。

paragraphs.source: CPO focused companies are now well beyond papers, pilot projects and demonstrations and and are making key product decisions such as optical port architecture to solve for high volume manufacturing. CPO for scale-up is now not a matter of if and why, but when and how – how to bring these systems to volume production, and when key component supply chain companies like laser manufacturers can ramp up sufficient production.

inline_elements.text: not a matter of if and why, but when and how

CPO for scale-up is now **not a matter of if and why, but when and how** – how to bring these systems to volume production, and when key component supply chain companies like laser manufacturers can ramp up sufficient production.

default.text: 专注 CPO 的企业如今早已度过论文、试点项目和演示阶段，正敲定光端口架构等关键产品决策，以攻克大批量制造难题。纵向扩展 CPO 如今 已不再是“是否”和“为何”要做的问题，而是“何时”与“如何”落地的问题——即如何将这些系统投入量产，以及激光器制造商等关键组件供应链企业何时能爬坡至充足产能。

paragraphs.source: This article will present an in-depth discussion on the benefits and challenges of CPO, how CPO architectures work, current and future CPO products, CPO focused companies, CPO-related components and their respective supply chains. This piece is intended to serve as a guide to practitioners, industry analysts, investors and everyone else who is interested in interconnect technology.

This piece is intended to serve as a guide to practitioners, industry analysts, investors and everyone else who is interested in interconnect technology.

default.text: 本文将深入探讨 CPO 的优势与挑战、架构原理、当前及未来的 CPO 产品、专注 CPO 的企业，以及 CPO 相关组件及其供应链。本文旨在为从业者、行业分析师、投资者，以及所有关注互连技术的读者提供一份参考指南。

paragraphs.source: In Part 1: CPO Total Cost of Ownership (TCO) Analysis, we start off by analyzing how adoption of CPO changes the total cost of ownership for scale-out and scale-up networks. We think that TCO, reliability, and equipment vendor bargaining power will be the primary considerations for adopting CPO in scale-out networks. We will explore whether CPO is ready for primetime when it comes to scale-out, touching on the data we have so far on solution reliability such as Meta’s CPO scale-out switch study presented at ECOC 2025.

inline_elements.text: Part 1: CPO Total Cost of Ownership (TCO) Analysis

paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: In **Part 1: CPO Total Cost of Ownership (TCO) Analysis**, we start off by analyzing how adoption of CPO changes the total cost of ownership for scale-out and scale-up networks. We think that TCO, reliability, and equipment vendor bargaining power will be the primary considerations for adopting CPO in scale-out networks. We will explore whether CPO is ready for primetime when it comes to scale-out, touching on the data we have so far on solution reliability such as **Meta’s CPO scale-out switch study** presented at ECOC 2025.

We think that TCO, reliability, and equipment vendor bargaining power will be the primary considerations for adopting CPO in scale-out networks. We will explore whether CPO is ready for primetime when it comes to scale-out, touching on the data we have so far on solution reliability such as Meta’s CPO scale-out switch study presented at ECOC 2025.

default.text: 在第一部分：CPO 的 TCO（总拥有成本）分析中，我们将首先分析采用 CPO 将如何改变 scale-out 和 scale-up 网络的 TCO。我们认为，TCO、可靠性以及设备供应商的议价能力，将是 scale-out 网络采用 CPO 的首要考量因素。我们将探讨 CPO 在 scale-out 领域是否已具备大规模商用的条件，并结合目前掌握的解决方案可靠性数据，例如 ECOC 2025 上展示的Meta 的 CPO scale-out 交换机研究。

paragraphs.source: In Part 2: CPO Introduction and Implementation, we will dive deeper into how CPO works. This section will explore the evolution of the market from copper to co-packaged copper and from digital signal processor (DSP) optics to linear pluggable optics (LPO) to CPO and the impetus and arguments for the adoption of CPO. SerDes scaling limits and Wide I/O as an alternative to SerDes – particularly when used in conjunction with CPO – will also be discussed.

default.text: 在第二部分：CPO 简介与实现中，我们将深入探讨 CPO 的工作原理。本节将梳理市场的演进历程，包括从铜缆到共封装铜缆，以及从带数字信号处理器（DSP）的光模块，到线性可插拔光模块（LPO），再到 CPO的演变，并分析采用 CPO 的驱动力与核心论点。此外，我们还将讨论SerDes 扩展瓶颈与 Wide I/O——探讨后者作为 SerDes 替代方案的潜力，尤其是在与 CPO 结合使用时的表现。

paragraphs.source: In Part 3: Bringing CPO to Market, we will describe critical technologies that will enable CPO to gain traction and come to market. We first discuss Host and Optical Engine packaging and explain TSMC COUPE in detail and why it is emerging as the integration option of choice. Fiber Attach Units (FAUs), Fiber coupling as well as Edge Coupling vs Grating Couplers will be explained thoroughly. We will cover modulator types such as Mach-Zender Modulators (MZMs), Micro-Ring Modulators (MRMs) and Electro-Absorption Modulators (EAMs). This section will end with explaining the core of why CPO is being adopted – the many different vectors for scaling bandwidth with CPO: More fibers attached, using wavelength division multiplexing (WDM) and higher order modulation.

inline_elements.text: Mach-Zender Modulators (MZMs), Micro-Ring Modulators (MRMs) and Electro-Absorption Modulators (EAMs)

We will cover modulator types such as **Mach-Zender Modulators (MZMs), Micro-Ring Modulators (MRMs) and Electro-Absorption Modulators (EAMs)**. default.text: 在第三部分：推动 CPO 走向市场中，我们将介绍促使 CPO 获得市场认可并实现商用的关键技术。我们首先讨论主机与光引擎的封装，详细解析台积电（TSMC）COUPE技术及其为何能脱颖而出成为首选的集成方案。随后，我们将深入剖析光纤连接单元（FAU）与光纤耦合技术，并对比端面耦合与光栅耦合器的差异。此外，本节还将探讨多种调制器类型，如马赫-曾德尔调制器（MZM）、微环调制器（MRM）和电吸收调制器（EAM）。本节最后将阐明业界采用 CPO 的核心原因，即 CPO 提供了扩展带宽的多种路径：增加光纤连接数量、使用波分复用（WDM）以及更高阶的调制技术。

paragraphs.source: In Part 4: CPO Products of Today and Tomorrow, we will analyze CPO products available on the market today and their associated supply chain. We will start with Nvidia and Broadcom’s solutions before discussing major CPO companies. We cover Ayar Labs, Nubis, Celestial AI, Lightmatter, Xscape Photonics, Ranovus and Scintil, describing each provider’s solution in detail and weigh in on important puts and takes for each company’s approach.

sections.title: Part 1: CPO Total Cost of Ownership (TCO) Analysis
sections.title_translation: 第一部分：CPO总拥有成本（TCO）分析

paragraphs.source: One of the most highly anticipated topics at Nvidia’s GTC 2025 earlier this year was Jensen announcing the company’s first CPO-enabled scale out network switches. Notably, for scale-up, Nvidia is still pushing forward with copper and going to extreme lengths to avoid going to optics, even out to 2027 and 2028.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: One of the most highly anticipated topics at Nvidia’s GTC 2025 earlier this year was Jensen announcing the company’s first CPO-enabled scale out network switches. Notably, for scale-up, Nvidia is still pushing forward with copper and going to extreme lengths to avoid going to optics, even out to 2027 and 2028.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: One of the most highly anticipated topics at Nvidia’s GTC 2025 earlier this year was Jensen announcing the company’s first CPO-enabled scale out network switches. Notably, for scale-up, Nvidia is still pushing forward with copper and going to extreme lengths to avoid going to optics, even out to 2027 and 2028.

default.text: 在今年早些时候的英伟达（NVIDIA）GTC 2025 上，最备受瞩目的焦点之一，莫过于黄仁勋宣布推出公司首款基于 CPO 技术的横向扩展网络交换机。值得注意的是，在纵向扩展方面，英伟达依然在坚持推进铜缆方案，极力避免转向光互连，这一策略甚至将延续至 2027 年和 2028 年。

paragraphs.source: Let’s begin our discussion regarding these new CPO-enabled switches by examining their total cost of ownership, analyzing the cost and power savings for scale-out CPO can deliver.

default.text: 让我们先从总拥有成本（TCO）入手，开启对这些新型 CPO 交换机的探讨，分析 CPO 能为横向扩展节省多少成本与功耗。

paragraphs.source: Nvidia’s GTC 2025 keynote announced three different CPO scale-out switches that utilize two different CPO-enabled switch ASICs. While there are TCO, power, and deployment speed benefits – they are not compelling enough for customers to jump headfirst into an entirely different deployment regime, and we expect to see limited adoption for the first wave of CPO scale-out switches. Let’s go through why.

default.text: 英伟达（NVIDIA）在 GTC 2025 主题演讲中发布了三款不同的 CPO 横向扩展交换机，这些设备搭载了两种不同的支持 CPO 的交换机 ASIC。尽管它们在 TCO、功耗和部署速度上具备优势，但这并不足以让客户贸然转向一套截然不同的部署体系。因此，我们预计首批 CPO 横向扩展交换机的采用率将十分有限。下面我们将剖析具体原因。

sections.title: Typical AI Cluster Networking Configuration and TCO
sections.title_translation: 典型AI集群组网配置与总拥有成本

paragraphs.source: A typical AI Cluster has three main networking fabrics, back-end, front-end and out of band management fabric. The most heavily utilized and technically demanding network fabric is the back-end fabric. The back-end fabric is used for scale-out communications between GPUs to communicate with one another and exchange data in collective operations to parallelize training and inference. Back-end networks typically use the InfiniBand or Ethernet protocols.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: A typical AI Cluster has three main networking fabrics, back-end, front-end and out of band management fabric. The most heavily utilized and technically demanding network fabric is the back-end fabric. The back-end fabric is used for scale-out communications between GPUs to communicate with one another and exchange data in collective operations to parallelize training and inference. Back-end networks typically use the InfiniBand or Ethernet protocols.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: A typical AI Cluster has three main networking fabrics, back-end, front-end and out of band management fabric. The most heavily utilized and technically demanding network fabric is the back-end fabric. The back-end fabric is used for scale-out communications between GPUs to communicate with one another and exchange data in collective operations to parallelize training and inference. Back-end networks typically use the InfiniBand or Ethernet protocols.

default.text: 典型的 AI 集群包含三大主要网络平面：后端网络、前端网络以及带外管理网络。其中，后端网络利用率最高，技术要求也最为苛刻。后端网络主要用于 GPU 间的横向扩展通信。GPU 依托该网络相互连接，并在集合通信操作中交换数据，进而实现训练与推理的并行化。后端网络通常采用 InfiniBand 或以太网协议。

paragraphs.source: Because of its demanding nature, the back-end network accounts for a dominant share of total networking cost and power, representing 85% of networking cost and 86% of networking power for 3-layer GB300 NVL72 clusters deployed on InfiniBand using Nvidia’s X800-Q3400 back-end switches. CPO-based switches and networking solutions can be used in both the back-end and front-end network, but we think that the focus for deployment at this stage will be in the back-end network. Readers can find much more details on back-end network topology, port, switch, and transceiver counts in our Optical Boogeyman Article from 2024 as well as in our AI Networking Model. Those that would like to understand total networking cost of ownership can read our AI Neocloud Anatomy and Playbook article.

inline_elements.text: AI Neocloud Anatomy and Playbook article

paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Because of its demanding nature, the back-end network accounts for a dominant share of total networking cost and power, representing 85% of networking cost and 86% of networking power for 3-layer GB300 NVL72 clusters deployed on InfiniBand using Nvidia’s X800-Q3400 back-end switches. CPO-based switches and networking solutions can be used in both the back-end and front-end network, but we think that the focus for deployment at this stage will be in the back-end network. Readers can find much more details on back-end network topology, port, switch, and transceiver counts in our [Optical Boogeyman Article from 2024](https://semianalysis.com/2024/03/25/nvidias-optical-boogeyman-nvl72-infiniband/#the-clos-non-blocking-fat-tree-network) as well as in our [AI Networking Model](https://semianalysis.com/ai-networking-model/). Those that would like to understand total networking cost of ownership can read our [AI Neocloud Anatomy and Playbook article](https://semianalysis.com/2024/10/03/ai-neocloud-playbook-and-anatomy/).

CPO-based switches and networking solutions can be used in both the back-end and front-end network, but we think that the focus for deployment at this stage will be in the back-end network. Those that would like to understand total networking cost of ownership can read our AI Neocloud Anatomy and Playbook article.

default.text: 后端网络对性能要求极高，因此在整体网络成本和功耗中占据绝对大头。以采用英伟达（NVIDIA）X800-Q3400 后端交换机、基于 InfiniBand 部署的三层 GB300 NVL72 集群为例，其后端网络占总网络成本的 85%，功耗占比高达 86%。尽管基于 CPO（共封装光学）的交换机与网络方案在前端和后端网络中均可使用，但我们认为现阶段的部署重心仍将集中在后端网络。关于后端网络拓扑、端口、交换机及光模块数量的详尽细节，读者可参阅我们 2024 年发布的《Optical Boogeyman》一文 以及 AI 网络模型。若想深入了解整体网络总拥有成本，请阅读我们的 《AI 新型云厂商剖析与实操指南》一文。

paragraphs.source: Zooming out – networking cost is the second largest component of total AI cluster cost behind the AI server itself. In a GB300 NVL72 Cluster with a 3-Layer InfiniBand network, this stands at 15% of total cluster cost, reaching 18% of total cluster cost for a 4-Layer network. Optical transceivers are a significant portion of this cost, accounting for 60% of networking cost for a 3-Layer network when using the relatively more expensive Nvidia LinkX Transceivers. They also consume 45% of total networking power for a 3-Layer network.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Zooming out – networking cost is the second largest component of total AI cluster cost behind the AI server itself. Optical transceivers are a significant portion of this cost, accounting for 60% of networking cost for a 3-Layer network when using the relatively more expensive Nvidia LinkX Transceivers. They also consume 45% of total networking power for a 3-Layer network.

default.text: 放眼全局，网络成本是 AI 集群总成本的第二大组成部分，仅次于 AI 服务器本身。在采用三层 InfiniBand 网络的 GB300 NVL72 集群中，网络成本占集群总成本的 15%；若采用四层网络，这一比例将达到 18%。光模块在这笔开销中占据大头。如果在三层网络中使用相对昂贵的英伟达（NVIDIA）LinkX 光模块，其成本将占到网络总成本的 60%。此外，在三层网络架构下，光模块还消耗了 45% 的网络总功耗。

paragraphs.source: The greater the number of GPUs in an AI cluster, the more likely it is that more networking layers will be needed. Going from a two-layer to a three-layer network and beyond means higher costs and a greater power budget. CPO can both help reduce power and cost holding number of layers constant, and can reduce total power and cost requirements by expanding the number of GPUs that can be connected on a network of a given number of layers.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The greater the number of GPUs in an AI cluster, the more likely it is that more networking layers will be needed. Going from a two-layer to a three-layer network and beyond means higher costs and a greater power budget. CPO can both help reduce power and cost holding number of layers constant, and can reduce total power and cost requirements by expanding the number of GPUs that can be connected on a network of a given number of layers.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The greater the number of GPUs in an AI cluster, the more likely it is that more networking layers will be needed. Going from a two-layer to a three-layer network and beyond means higher costs and a greater power budget. CPO can both help reduce power and cost holding number of layers constant, and can reduce total power and cost requirements by expanding the number of GPUs that can be connected on a network of a given number of layers.

default.text: AI 集群中的 GPU 数量越多，往往越需要增加网络层级。网络架构从两层扩展至三层甚至更多层，意味着更高的成本与更大的功耗预算。CPO 具备双重优势：一方面，在保持网络层级不变的前提下，它有助于降低功耗与成本；另一方面，在给定层级的网络中，它能增加可连接的 GPU 数量，从而降低整体的功耗与成本需求。

paragraphs.source: Earlier this year, at GTC 2025, Nvidia’s CEO Jensen Huang highlighted the immense power consumption from transceivers alone as a key impetus for CPO. Using some of the per-rack power budgets from the above table, a 200,000 GB300 NVL72 (72 GPU packages and 144 compute chiplets per rack) GPU cluster on a three-layer network would consume 435 MW of Critical IT Power of which 17 MW would be consumed by optical transceivers alone. Clearly there is an immense amount of power that can be saved by eliminating most of the transceiver content.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Earlier this year, at GTC 2025, Nvidia’s CEO Jensen Huang highlighted the immense power consumption from transceivers alone as a key impetus for CPO. Using some of the per-rack power budgets from the above table, a 200,000 GB300 NVL72 (72 GPU packages and 144 compute chiplets per rack) GPU cluster on a three-layer network would consume 435 MW of Critical IT Power of which 17 MW would be consumed by optical transceivers alone. Clearly there is an immense amount of power that can be saved by eliminating most of the transceiver content.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Earlier this year, at GTC 2025, Nvidia’s CEO Jensen Huang highlighted the immense power consumption from transceivers alone as a key impetus for CPO. Using some of the per-rack power budgets from the above table, a 200,000 GB300 NVL72 (72 GPU packages and 144 compute chiplets per rack) GPU cluster on a three-layer network would consume 435 MW of Critical IT Power of which 17 MW would be consumed by optical transceivers alone. Clearly there is an immense amount of power that can be saved by eliminating most of the transceiver content.

default.text: 今年早些时候，在 GTC 2025 上，英伟达（NVIDIA）CEO 黄仁勋强调，仅收发器产生的巨大功耗便是推动 CPO 的关键动力。结合上表的单机架功耗预算，一个采用三层网络架构、规模达 20 万颗 GPU 的 GB300 NVL72 GPU集群（GPU cluster）（单机架包含 72 个 GPU 封装与 144 个计算小芯片），其关键 IT 功耗将高达 435 MW，其中仅光收发器就会消耗 17 MW。显然，若能剔除大部分收发器组件，必将节省巨量功耗。

paragraphs.source: This can be easily seen by comparing the power used in just one 800G DSP transceiver to the power consumed by optical engines and laser sources (per 800G bandwidth) within a CPO system. While an 800G DR4 optical transceiver consumes about 16-17W, we estimate that the optical engine together with external laser sources used in Nvidia’s Q3450 CPO switch consume about 4-5W per 800G of bandwidth, a 73% reduction in power.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: This can be easily seen by comparing the power used in just one 800G DSP transceiver to the power consumed by optical engines and laser sources (per 800G bandwidth) within a CPO system. While an 800G DR4 optical transceiver consumes about 16-17W, we estimate that the optical engine together with external laser sources used in Nvidia’s Q3450 CPO switch consume about 4-5W per 800G of bandwidth, a 73% reduction in power.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: This can be easily seen by comparing the power used in just one 800G DSP transceiver to the power consumed by optical engines and laser sources (per 800G bandwidth) within a CPO system. While an 800G DR4 optical transceiver consumes about 16-17W, we estimate that the optical engine together with external laser sources used in Nvidia’s Q3450 CPO switch consume about 4-5W per 800G of bandwidth, a 73% reduction in power.

default.text: 将单个 800G DSP 收发器的功耗与 CPO 系统内部光引擎及激光源的功耗（按每 800G 带宽折算）进行对比，这一点便一目了然。单个 800G DR4 光收发器的功耗约为 16-17W，而据我们测算，英伟达 Q3450 CPO 交换机所采用的光引擎及外部激光源，每 800G 带宽功耗仅约为 4-5W，降幅高达 73%。

paragraphs.source: These figures are very close to those presented by Meta in its paper published and presented at ECOC 2025. In this report – Meta showed how an 800G 2xFR4 pluggable transceiver consumes about 15W while the optical engine and laser source within the Broadcom Bailly 51.2T CPO switch consumes about 5.4W per 800G of bandwidth delivered, a 65% power savings.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: These figures are very close to those presented by Meta in its paper published and presented at ECOC 2025. In this report – Meta showed how an 800G 2xFR4 pluggable transceiver consumes about 15W while the optical engine and laser source within the Broadcom Bailly 51.2T CPO switch consumes about 5.4W per 800G of bandwidth delivered, a 65% power savings.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: These figures are very close to those presented by Meta in its paper published and presented at ECOC 2025. In this report – Meta showed how an 800G 2xFR4 pluggable transceiver consumes about 15W while the optical engine and laser source within the Broadcom Bailly 51.2T CPO switch consumes about 5.4W per 800G of bandwidth delivered, a 65% power savings.

default.text: 这些数据与 Meta 在 ECOC 2025 大会上发表并展示的论文数据极为接近。该报告指出，单个 800G 2xFR4 可插拔收发器的功耗约为 15W，而博通 Bailly 51.2T CPO 交换机内部的光引擎与激光源，每提供 800G 带宽的功耗约为 5.4W，功耗降幅达 65%。

paragraphs.source: Let’s expand this analysis to the cluster level. Turning to a GB300 NVL72 cluster built on a three-Layer network, we see that moving from DSP transceivers to using LPO transceivers in the back-end network can reduce total transceiver power by 36% and total network power by 16%. A full transition to CPO yields even greater savings vs DSP optics – cutting transceiver power by 84% – though part of this power saving is offset by adding optical engines (OEs) and external light sources (ELSs) to the switches, which now consume 23% more power in aggregate. In the below example, optical transceiver power in the CPO scenario remains floored at 1,000W per sever because we assume that front-end networking will still use DSP transceivers.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Let’s expand this analysis to the cluster level. Turning to a GB300 NVL72 cluster built on a three-Layer network, we see that moving from DSP transceivers to using LPO transceivers in the back-end network can reduce total transceiver power by 36% and total network power by 16%. A full transition to CPO yields even greater savings vs DSP optics – cutting transceiver power by 84% – though part of this power saving is offset by adding optical engines (OEs) and external light sources (ELSs) to the switches, which now consume 23% more power in aggregate. In the below example, optical transceiver power in the CPO scenario remains floored at 1,000W per sever because we assume that front-end networking will still use DSP transceivers.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Let’s expand this analysis to the cluster level. Turning to a GB300 NVL72 cluster built on a three-Layer network, we see that moving from DSP transceivers to using LPO transceivers in the back-end network can reduce total transceiver power by 36% and total network power by 16%. A full transition to CPO yields even greater savings vs DSP optics – cutting transceiver power by 84% – though part of this power saving is offset by adding optical engines (OEs) and external light sources (ELSs) to the switches, which now consume 23% more power in aggregate. In the below example, optical transceiver power in the CPO scenario remains floored at 1,000W per sever because we assume that front-end networking will still use DSP transceivers.

pro.text: 我们将把分析拓展至集群层面。以基于三层网络搭建的GB300 NVL72集群为例，不难发现：若后端网络从数字信号处理器（Digital Signal Processor，DSP）收发器改用线性驱动可插拔光学（Linear-drive Pluggable Optics，LPO）收发器，总光收发器功耗可降低36%，网络总功耗可降低16%。相比DSP光器件，全面转向共封装光学（co-packaged optics，CPO）可实现更大幅度的功耗节省——光收发器功耗降幅可达84%，不过部分功耗节省会被新增功耗抵消：交换机需要加装光引擎（optical engines，OE）和外部光源（external light sources，ELS），因此交换机总功耗会上升23%。在下述示例中，CPO方案下每台服务器的光收发器功耗底线为1000W，这是因为我们假设前端网络仍采用DSP收发器。

applied_terms: ‘435 MW of Critical IT Power’, ‘17 MW’等功耗数据需确保单位（兆瓦）准确无误。
‘specifically enables this’中的‘this’指代前文‘连接更多GPU’，翻译时需明确指代关系。
端口数量（512 ports of 800G）和GPU连接数（131,072）的对比需清晰呈现，突出数量级差异。

understanding.role_in_article: 用具体功耗数据强化CPO的节能价值主张，并展示CPO如何通过高密度端口改变集群规模上限。引用Nvidia数据说明光模块功耗的绝对规模，并通过对比不同交换机端口的GPU连接能力，论证CPO对超大规模集群的必要性。
understanding.relation_to_previous: 直接延续03部分对成本和功耗的讨论，从“成本占比”聚焦到“具体功耗数值”和“集群规模可扩展性”这一更深层优势。
understanding.relation_to_next: 逻辑上平行于05-cpo-scale-out-total-cost-of-ow，本部分讲“功耗预算”，下一部分讲“成本细节”，共同构成CPO在scale-out场景的TCO分析核心。末句“It is a similar story when looking at total cluster capital cost.”直接桥接至下一部分。
key_points: Nvidia以光模块巨大功耗作为推动CPO的关键理由，并以20万GPU集群的435MW总功耗中17MW来自光模块为例。
Spectrum 6800 CPO交换机凭借512个800G端口，相比6810，能将两层网络支持的GPU数量从8,192提升至131,072，实现规模突破。
CPO在降低总集群资本成本方面有类似故事。
translation_notes: ‘435 MW of Critical IT Power’, ‘17 MW’等功耗数据需确保单位（兆瓦）准确无误。
‘specifically enables this’中的‘this’指代前文‘连接更多GPU’，翻译时需明确指代关系。
端口数量（512 ports of 800G）和GPU连接数（131,072）的对比需清晰呈现，突出数量级差异。

paragraphs.source: The use of Nvidia’s CPO scale-out switches implicitly means a high radix network is used by default, though this is “abstracted” from the end users because the shuffle happens inside the switch box as opposed to outside the switch box via patch panels or octopus cables when using high radix non-CPO switches. Instead, these Nvidia CPO switches present themselves as having a very high port count – the Quantum 3450 offering 144 ports of 800G, and the Spectrum 6800 offering 512 ports of 800G for example.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The use of Nvidia’s CPO scale-out switches implicitly means a high radix network is used by default, though this is “abstracted” from the end users because the shuffle happens inside the switch box as opposed to outside the switch box via patch panels or octopus cables when using high radix non-CPO switches. Instead, these Nvidia CPO switches present themselves as having a very high port count – the Quantum 3450 offering 144 ports of 800G, and the Spectrum 6800 offering 512 ports of 800G for example. We use the word “by default” because Nvidia’s non-CPO InfiniBand Quantum Q3400 switch also offers 144 ports of 800G, though its other InfiniBand switches such as the QM9700 only offer 32 ports of 800G - with only the former offering this “high radix in a box” to deliver a high number of effective ports. This high port count could potentially allow customers to flatten a network from a three-Layer to a two-layer network and is also saves customers the trouble of deploying shuffle boxes and patch panels or unwieldy octopus cables and could be a key selling point. In the two-layer case, transceiver power is reduced by 84%, switch power is down by 21% and total networking power can be reduced by 48% vs traditional DSP transceivers.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The use of Nvidia’s CPO scale-out switches implicitly means a high radix network is used by default, though this is “abstracted” from the end users because the shuffle happens inside the switch box as opposed to outside the switch box via patch panels or octopus cables when using high radix non-CPO switches. Instead, these Nvidia CPO switches present themselves as having a very high port count – the Quantum 3450 offering 144 ports of 800G, and the Spectrum 6800 offering 512 ports of 800G for example. We use the word “by default” because Nvidia’s non-CPO InfiniBand Quantum Q3400 switch also offers 144 ports of 800G, though its other InfiniBand switches such as the QM9700 only offer 32 ports of 800G - with only the former offering this “high radix in a box” to deliver a high number of effective ports. This high port count could potentially allow customers to flatten a network from a three-Layer to a two-layer network and is also saves customers the trouble of deploying shuffle boxes and patch panels or unwieldy octopus cables and could be a key selling point. In the two-layer case, transceiver power is reduced by 84%, switch power is down by 21% and total networking power can be reduced by 48% vs traditional DSP transceivers.

default.text: 采用英伟达（NVIDIA）的 CPO 横向扩展交换机，实际上意味着默认采用高基数网络。不过，这一底层细节对最终用户而言被“抽象化”屏蔽了。在使用非 CPO 高基数交换机时，链路交织（shuffle）通常需要借助配线架或一分多分支线缆在交换机外部完成；而在 CPO 架构下，交织直接在交换机内部完成。取而代之的是，这些英伟达 CPO 交换机直接呈现出极高的端口数量——例如，Quantum 3450 提供 144 个 800G 端口，Spectrum 6800 提供 512 个 800G 端口。

paragraphs.source: We use the word “by default” because Nvidia’s non-CPO InfiniBand Quantum Q3400 switch also offers 144 ports of 800G, though its other InfiniBand switches such as the QM9700 only offer 32 ports of 800G - with only the former offering this “high radix in a box” to deliver a high number of effective ports. This high port count could potentially allow customers to flatten a network from a three-Layer to a two-layer network and is also saves customers the trouble of deploying shuffle boxes and patch panels or unwieldy octopus cables and could be a key selling point. In the two-layer case, transceiver power is reduced by 84%, switch power is down by 21% and total networking power can be reduced by 48% vs traditional DSP transceivers.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The use of Nvidia’s CPO scale-out switches implicitly means a high radix network is used by default, though this is “abstracted” from the end users because the shuffle happens inside the switch box as opposed to outside the switch box via patch panels or octopus cables when using high radix non-CPO switches. Instead, these Nvidia CPO switches present themselves as having a very high port count – the Quantum 3450 offering 144 ports of 800G, and the Spectrum 6800 offering 512 ports of 800G for example. We use the word “by default” because Nvidia’s non-CPO InfiniBand Quantum Q3400 switch also offers 144 ports of 800G, though its other InfiniBand switches such as the QM9700 only offer 32 ports of 800G - with only the former offering this “high radix in a box” to deliver a high number of effective ports. This high port count could potentially allow customers to flatten a network from a three-Layer to a two-layer network and is also saves customers the trouble of deploying shuffle boxes and patch panels or unwieldy octopus cables and could be a key selling point. In the two-layer case, transceiver power is reduced by 84%, switch power is down by 21% and total networking power can be reduced by 48% vs traditional DSP transceivers.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The use of Nvidia’s CPO scale-out switches implicitly means a high radix network is used by default, though this is “abstracted” from the end users because the shuffle happens inside the switch box as opposed to outside the switch box via patch panels or octopus cables when using high radix non-CPO switches. Instead, these Nvidia CPO switches present themselves as having a very high port count – the Quantum 3450 offering 144 ports of 800G, and the Spectrum 6800 offering 512 ports of 800G for example. We use the word “by default” because Nvidia’s non-CPO InfiniBand Quantum Q3400 switch also offers 144 ports of 800G, though its other InfiniBand switches such as the QM9700 only offer 32 ports of 800G - with only the former offering this “high radix in a box” to deliver a high number of effective ports. This high port count could potentially allow customers to flatten a network from a three-Layer to a two-layer network and is also saves customers the trouble of deploying shuffle boxes and patch panels or unwieldy octopus cables and could be a key selling point. In the two-layer case, transceiver power is reduced by 84%, switch power is down by 21% and total networking power can be reduced by 48% vs traditional DSP transceivers.

default.text: 我们之所以使用“默认”一词，是因为英伟达非 CPO 架构的 InfiniBand Quantum Q3400 交换机同样提供 144 个 800G 端口，而 QM9700 等其他 InfiniBand 交换机仅提供 32 个 800G 端口——只有前者通过“单机高基数”（high radix in a box）设计实现了海量有效端口。这种高端口数有望让客户将三层网络扁平化为两层，同时免去部署交织盒、配线架或笨重的一分多分支线缆的繁琐，这可能成为一大核心卖点。在两层网络架构下，与传统 DSP 光模块相比，光模块功耗降低 84%，交换机功耗下降 21%，整体网络功耗可减少 48%。

paragraphs.source: The Spectrum 6800 switch, with its large number of ports in both available logical configurations - 512 ports of 800G – specifically enables this when compared to the Spectrum 6810, which offers 128 ports of 800G, 256 ports of 400G or 512 ports of 200G. For the 128 ports of 800G option using the Spectrum 6810, a network could connect up to 8,192 GPUs for a two-layer network, while the Spectrum 6800 at 512 ports of 800G can connect 131,072 GPUs.

paragraphs.source: The magic comes from the fact that the number of ports k is exponentiated by the number of layers. Thus, for a two-layer network, doubling the number of logical ports by assigning half the bandwidth per port (i.e. slicing an 800G port into two 400G ports) using either an internal shuffle (as is the case with the Spectrum 6800), breakout cables or twin-port transceivers means four times the hosts supported!
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The magic comes from the fact that the number of ports k is exponentiated by the number of layers. Thus, for a two-layer network, doubling the number of logical ports by assigning half the bandwidth per port (i.e. slicing an 800G port into two 400G ports) using either an internal shuffle (as is the case with the Spectrum 6800), breakout cables or twin-port transceivers means four times the hosts supported!
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The magic comes from the fact that the number of ports k is exponentiated by the number of layers. Thus, for a two-layer network, doubling the number of logical ports by assigning half the bandwidth per port (i.e. slicing an 800G port into two 400G ports) using either an internal shuffle (as is the case with the Spectrum 6800), breakout cables or twin-port transceivers means four times the hosts supported!

default.text: 其中的奇妙之处在于，端口数 k 会以网络层数为指数进行幂运算。因此，对于两层网络而言，将每个端口的带宽减半（即把一个 800G 端口拆分为两个 400G 端口）以使逻辑端口数量翻倍——无论是采用内部重排（如 Spectrum 6800 那样）、分支线缆还是双端口光模块——都意味着所支持的主机数量将增至四倍！

paragraphs.source: The power savings discussed in this section so far, 23% for a three-layer CPO network and 48% going down to a two-layer CPO network sounds fantastic, but the wrinkle is that networking is just 9% of total cluster power to begin with for a three-layer network. So, at the end of the day the impact of switching to CPO is diluted considerably at least for scale-out networks. Switching to use CPO for a three-layer network lowers networking power by 23% but only delivers 2% total cluster power savings. Moving to a two-layer network delivers 48% lower networking cost, but only 4% total cluster power savings.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The power savings discussed in this section so far, 23% for a three-layer CPO network and 48% going down to a two-layer CPO network sounds fantastic, but the wrinkle is that networking is just 9% of total cluster power to begin with for a three-layer network. So, at the end of the day the impact of switching to CPO is diluted considerably at least for scale-out networks. Switching to use CPO for a three-layer network lowers networking power by 23% but only delivers 2% total cluster power savings. Moving to a two-layer network delivers 48% lower networking cost, but only 4% total cluster power savings.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The power savings discussed in this section so far, 23% for a three-layer CPO network and 48% going down to a two-layer CPO network sounds fantastic, but the wrinkle is that networking is just 9% of total cluster power to begin with for a three-layer network. So, at the end of the day the impact of switching to CPO is diluted considerably at least for scale-out networks. Switching to use CPO for a three-layer network lowers networking power by 23% but only delivers 2% total cluster power savings. Moving to a two-layer network delivers 48% lower networking cost, but only 4% total cluster power savings.

pro.text: 截至目前本节讨论的功耗节省效果——三层CPO网络可节省23%，精简为两层CPO网络可节省48%——听起来十分可观，但问题在于，对于三层网络架构而言，网络部分本身仅占集群总功耗的9%。因此，切换为CPO对整体功耗的影响会被大幅稀释，至少在横向扩展网络中是如此。三层网络改用CPO后，网络功耗降低23%，但仅能带来2%的集群总功耗节省；精简为两层CPO网络后，网络功耗降低48%，也仅能带来4%的集群总功耗节省。

sections.title: CPO Scale-out Total Cost of Ownership (TCO)

paragraphs.source: Let’s briefly zoom into some of the cost details when comparing transceivers to a CPO solution. The first Nvidia CPO Switch, the Quantum X800-Q3450 CPO will use 72 optical engines each operating at 1.6Tbit/s; later versions of Quantum CPO switches will likely transition to 36 optical engines at 3.2Tbit/s each, costing ~$1,000 per unit (including FAUs), which translate to $36k of total OE cost per system.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Let’s briefly zoom into some of the cost details when comparing transceivers to a CPO solution. The first Nvidia CPO Switch, the Quantum X800-Q3450 CPO will use 72 optical engines each operating at 1.6Tbit/s; later versions of Quantum CPO switches will likely transition to 36 optical engines at 3.2Tbit/s each, costing ~$1,000 per unit (including FAUs), which translate to $36k of total OE cost per system.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Let’s briefly zoom into some of the cost details when comparing transceivers to a CPO solution. The first Nvidia CPO Switch, the Quantum X800-Q3450 CPO will use 72 optical engines each operating at 1.6Tbit/s; later versions of Quantum CPO switches will likely transition to 36 optical engines at 3.2Tbit/s each, costing ~$1,000 per unit (including FAUs), which translate to $36k of total OE cost per system.

pro.text:
**修订后的译文**：
让我们深入审视传统收发器与共封装光学（CPO）方案的成本细节。英伟达首款CPO交换机Quantum X800-Q3450将采用72个光引擎，每个运行速率1.6T比特/秒；后续Quantum CPO交换机预计将转向36个光引擎，每个速率3.2T比特/秒，单价约1000美元（含FAU），这意味着每台系统的光引擎总成本约为3.6万美元。

applied_terms: ‘Zoom into’呼应前文，可译为‘深入审视’。
‘1.6Tbit/s’和‘3.2Tbit/s’需准确翻译为‘1.6T比特/秒’和‘3.2T比特/秒’，单位统一。
‘cost’一词虽未展开，但暗示后续有详细成本分析，翻译时需保持语句的开放性，为下文留出空间。此段可能是总分结构的总起句。

paragraphs.source: To put this into perspective, consider the total cost if traditional optical transceiver modules were used instead. The non-CPO X800-Q3400 features 72 OSFP cages, and a 1.6T twin-port transceiver is used to provide 144 ports at 800G. Assuming a cost of $1,000 for a generic 1.6T DR8 transceiver, total transceiver cost to populate this switch would amount $72,000, which is double the estimated $35-40k cost of optical engines and ELS needed to deliver the same amount of bandwidth for CPO switch. However, this doesn’t take into account the switch vendor’s margin. If we were to apply a 60% gross margin, optical engine cost to the end buyer would end up at $80k-$90k USD – which is higher cost than the transceiver equivalent.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: To put this into perspective, consider the total cost if traditional optical transceiver modules were used instead. The non-CPO X800-Q3400 features 72 OSFP cages, and a 1.6T twin-port transceiver is used to provide 144 ports at 800G. Assuming a cost of $1,000 for a generic 1.6T DR8 transceiver, total transceiver cost to populate this switch would amount $72,000, which is double the estimated $35-40k cost of optical engines and ELS needed to deliver the same amount of bandwidth for CPO switch. However, this doesn’t take into account the switch vendor’s margin. If we were to apply a 60% gross margin, optical engine cost to the end buyer would end up at $80k-$90k USD – which is higher cost than the transceiver equivalent. There are still other components like fiber shuffles and other components that would be subject to such a margin stack. This explains why, depending on the cost paid for transceivers and the margin taken by the switch vendor, cost savings when moving to CPO may not be dramatic.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: To put this into perspective, consider the total cost if traditional optical transceiver modules were used instead. The non-CPO X800-Q3400 features 72 OSFP cages, and a 1.6T twin-port transceiver is used to provide 144 ports at 800G. Assuming a cost of $1,000 for a generic 1.6T DR8 transceiver, total transceiver cost to populate this switch would amount $72,000, which is double the estimated $35-40k cost of optical engines and ELS needed to deliver the same amount of bandwidth for CPO switch. However, this doesn’t take into account the switch vendor’s margin. If we were to apply a 60% gross margin, optical engine cost to the end buyer would end up at $80k-$90k USD – which is higher cost than the transceiver equivalent. There are still other components like fiber shuffles and other components that would be subject to such a margin stack. This explains why, depending on the cost paid for transceivers and the margin taken by the switch vendor, cost savings when moving to CPO may not be dramatic.

pro.text: 为了更直观地对比，若采用传统光收发器模块，成本情况如下：非CPO版本的X800-Q3400拥有72个OSFP笼，采用1.6T双端口收发器可提供144个800G端口。假设通用1.6T DR8收发器单价为1000美元，则填充该交换机的收发器总成本将达到7.2万美元，是CPO交换机实现相同带宽所需光引擎和电接口侧（ELS）估计成本（3.5万至4万美元）的两倍。不过，这还没有考虑交换机厂商的毛利率。若按60%的毛利率计算，最终卖给客户的CPO光引擎成本将达到8万至9万美元——反而比采用收发器的方案成本更高。

paragraphs.source: We can see in the table below, when switching from transceivers to CPO on a three-layer network, the additional margin taken on CPO components increases switch costs by 81% which detracts from the 86% savings by not purchasing transceivers. Total networking cost is still 31% lower for CPO than for using DSP transceivers, but as was the case with power, the server rack’s dominant share of cluster TCO means that total cluster costs only drop by 3%.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: We can see in the table below, when switching from transceivers to CPO on a three-layer network, the additional margin taken on CPO components increases switch costs by 81% which detracts from the 86% savings by not purchasing transceivers. Total networking cost is still 31% lower for CPO than for using DSP transceivers, but as was the case with power, the server rack’s dominant share of cluster TCO means that total cluster costs only drop by 3%.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: We can see in the table below, when switching from transceivers to CPO on a three-layer network, the additional margin taken on CPO components increases switch costs by 81% which detracts from the 86% savings by not purchasing transceivers. Total networking cost is still 31% lower for CPO than for using DSP transceivers, but as was the case with power, the server rack’s dominant share of cluster TCO means that total cluster costs only drop by 3%.

pro.text: 从下表可以看出，在三层网络中从收发器切换到CPO后，CPO组件上增加的毛利空间导致交换机成本上升81%，大幅抵消了不采购收发器所带来的86%节省。总体网络成本采用CPO仍比使用带DSP的收发器低31%，但正如功耗情况一样，由于服务器机架在集群总体拥有成本（TCO）中占比最大，集群总成本仅下降3%。

paragraphs.source: Flattening the network down to two-layers instead of three-layers can deliver more cost savings though – up to an 7% total cluster cost reduction, with transceiver cost down 86%, and total networking cost decreased by 46%.

paragraphs.source: So – if CPO offers only up to 7% cost savings and up to 4% power savings on one hand, but on the other hand raises concerns about difficult field servicing, anxiety (justified or not) over reliability and blast radius, and the loss of bargaining power that one has with multiple transceiver vendors – why is it being adopted by GPU clouds? The simple answer is that it is not being adopted widely just yet – we do not expect a rapid adoption curve for scale-out CPO systems within hyperscalers in the near term.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: So – if CPO offers only up to 7% cost savings and up to 4% power savings on one hand, but on the other hand raises concerns about difficult field servicing, anxiety (justified or not) over reliability and blast radius, and the loss of bargaining power that one has with multiple transceiver vendors – why is it being adopted by GPU clouds? The simple answer is that it is not being adopted widely just yet – we do not expect a rapid adoption curve for scale-out CPO systems within hyperscalers in the near term.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: So – if CPO offers only up to 7% cost savings and up to 4% power savings on one hand, but on the other hand raises concerns about difficult field servicing, anxiety (justified or not) over reliability and blast radius, and the loss of bargaining power that one has with multiple transceiver vendors – why is it being adopted by GPU clouds? The simple answer is that it is not being adopted widely just yet – we do not expect a rapid adoption curve for scale-out CPO systems within hyperscalers in the near term.

pro.text: 那么，如果共封装光学（CPO）一方面仅能提供最高7%的成本节省和最高4%的功耗节省，另一方面却引发现场维护困难、对可靠性和爆炸半径的担忧（无论是否合理）、以及失去多家收发器厂商议价能力的问题——为什么GPU云服务商仍在采用它？简单的答案是：它目前尚未被广泛采用——我们预计在短期内，超大规模数据中心内横向扩展CPO系统的采用曲线不会快速上升。

applied_terms: ‘Zoom into’呼应前文，可译为‘深入审视’。
‘1.6Tbit/s’和‘3.2Tbit/s’需准确翻译为‘1.6T比特/秒’和‘3.2T比特/秒’，单位统一。
‘cost’一词虽未展开，但暗示后续有详细成本分析，翻译时需保持语句的开放性，为下文留出空间。此段可能是总分结构的总起句。

understanding.role_in_article: 从宏观TCO论证转向具体的成本构成对比。以Nvidia首款CPO交换机为例，初步揭示其光学引擎配置和成本结构，为Part 5详述供应链做铺垫，并暗示成本演进的路径（如从72个1.6T引擎向36个3.2T引擎演进）。
understanding.relation_to_previous: 直接承接04部分末句，开始详细分析“总资本成本”的故事。从功耗优势的论证，转入具体成本细节的剖析。
understanding.relation_to_next: 作为Part 1的收尾，它提供了一个从商业分析（TCO）转向技术实现（如何制造、供应链如何组织）的桥梁。其提到的‘optical engines’、‘cost’等关键词直接引向Part 3（制造）和Part 5（供应链）的深度讨论。
key_points: 通过对比传统可插拔光模块与CPO方案的成本细节来量化节省。
Nvidia Quantum X800-Q3450 CPO交换机采用72个1.6T光引擎，未来可能升级为36个3.2T光引擎以优化成本。
具体成本数据和分析（虽未在摘要中完整显示）是本节核心。

paragraphs.source: On the contrary, we see CPO for scale-up as the killer application. As mentioned earlier, major hyperscalers are already making commitments to suppliers for deployment of CPO-based scale-up solutions by the end of the decade.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: On the contrary, we see CPO for scale-up as the killer application. As mentioned earlier, major hyperscalers are already making commitments to suppliers for deployment of CPO-based scale-up solutions by the end of the decade.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: On the contrary, we see CPO for scale-up as the killer application. As mentioned earlier, major hyperscalers are already making commitments to suppliers for deployment of CPO-based scale-up solutions by the end of the decade.

pro.text: 相反，我们认为共封装光学（CPO）在纵向扩展中的应用才是关键杀手级应用。正如前文所述，主要的超大规模云服务商已经开始向供应商做出承诺，计划在本十年末部署基于CPO的纵向扩展解决方案。

paragraphs.source: Currently, the incumbent copper-based scale up paradigm is being pushed to its limits due to the limited reach of copper cables – two meters at best when running at 200Gbit/s per lane, as well as the increasing difficulty of doubling bandwidth per lane. CPO can solve these problems as it can meet bandwidth density requirements, provide multiple vectors for scaling bandwidth well into the future as well as unlock much larger scale up world sizes.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Currently, the incumbent copper-based scale up paradigm is being pushed to its limits due to the limited reach of copper cables – two meters at best when running at 200Gbit/s per lane, as well as the increasing difficulty of doubling bandwidth per lane. CPO can solve these problems as it can meet bandwidth density requirements, provide multiple vectors for scaling bandwidth well into the future as well as unlock much larger scale up world sizes.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Currently, the incumbent copper-based scale up paradigm is being pushed to its limits due to the limited reach of copper cables – two meters at best when running at 200Gbit/s per lane, as well as the increasing difficulty of doubling bandwidth per lane. CPO can solve these problems as it can meet bandwidth density requirements, provide multiple vectors for scaling bandwidth well into the future as well as unlock much larger scale up world sizes.

pro.text: 目前，主流的基于铜缆的纵向扩展模式正面临极限：当每通道速率达到200Gbit/s时，铜缆最远只能传输两米，同时每通道带宽翻倍也变得越来越困难。共封装光学（CPO）能够解决这些问题，它可以满足带宽密度要求，并为未来带宽持续扩展提供多种技术路径，同时解锁规模大得多的纵向扩展域。

paragraphs.source: Once CPO is deployed for scale-up networking, the scale-up domain will no longer be limited by the interconnect reach. In principle, customers would be able to grow scale-up domains to arbitrarily large sizes. Of course, if one wants to keep the scale-up domain within a single-tier fan-out network that allows for all-to-all connections, the scale-up domain size would become limited by the switch radix.

In principle, customers would be able to grow scale-up domains to arbitrarily large sizes. Of course, if one wants to keep the scale-up domain within a single-tier fan-out network that allows for all-to-all connections, the scale-up domain size would become limited by the switch radix.

In principle, customers would be able to grow scale-up domains to arbitrarily large sizes. Of course, if one wants to keep the scale-up domain within a single-tier fan-out network that allows for all-to-all connections, the scale-up domain size would become limited by the switch radix.

pro.text: 一旦CPO部署于纵向扩展网络，纵向扩展域将不再受互连距离限制。原则上，客户能够将纵向扩展域扩展到任意规模。当然，如果希望将纵向扩展域保持在支持全互联的单级扇出网络内，其规模仍会受到交换机基数（switch radix）的限制。

paragraphs.source: Networking requirements of the scale up fabric are far more demanding than that of the back-end scale-out network. The GPU to GPU or switch links require much higher bandwidth and lower latency to enable the GPUs to be interconnected so that they can coherently share resources such as memory.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Networking requirements of the scale up fabric are far more demanding than that of the back-end scale-out network. The GPU to GPU or switch links require much higher bandwidth and lower latency to enable the GPUs to be interconnected so that they can coherently share resources such as memory.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Networking requirements of the scale up fabric are far more demanding than that of the back-end scale-out network. The GPU to GPU or switch links require much higher bandwidth and lower latency to enable the GPUs to be interconnected so that they can coherently share resources such as memory.

pro.text: 纵向扩展网络架构对网络的要求远高于后端横向扩展网络。GPU到GPU或GPU到交换机的链路需要更高的带宽和更低的延迟，才能让GPU实现互连并连贯地共享内存等资源。

paragraphs.source: To illustrate, 5th generation NVLink on Nvidia Blackwell offers 900GByte/s (7,200 Gbit/s) of uni-directional bandwidth per GPU. That is 9x more bandwidth per GPU than the 100GByte/s (800Gbit/s) per GPU on the back-end scale out network (using the CX-8 NIC for the GB300 NVL72). This also creates the need for much higher shoreline bandwidth density from the host which has been the impetus for pushing GPU SerDes line speeds forward.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: To illustrate, 5th generation NVLink on Nvidia Blackwell offers 900GByte/s (7,200 Gbit/s) of uni-directional bandwidth per GPU. That is 9x more bandwidth per GPU than the 100GByte/s (800Gbit/s) per GPU on the back-end scale out network (using the CX-8 NIC for the GB300 NVL72). This also creates the need for much higher shoreline bandwidth density from the host which has been the impetus for pushing GPU SerDes line speeds forward.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: To illustrate, 5th generation NVLink on Nvidia Blackwell offers 900GByte/s (7,200 Gbit/s) of uni-directional bandwidth per GPU. That is 9x more bandwidth per GPU than the 100GByte/s (800Gbit/s) per GPU on the back-end scale out network (using the CX-8 NIC for the GB300 NVL72). This also creates the need for much higher shoreline bandwidth density from the host which has been the impetus for pushing GPU SerDes line speeds forward.

pro.text: 以英伟达布莱克韦尔（Blackwell）上的第五代NVLink为例，每块GPU可提供900 GB/s（7,200 Gbit/s）的单向带宽。这比后端横向扩展网络中每块GPU的100 GB/s（800 Gbit/s）带宽高出9倍（后端使用CX-8 NIC连接GB300 NVL72）。这也对主机侧的边缘带宽密度提出了更高要求，正是推动GPU SerDes线速率不断提升的主要动力。

paragraphs.source: It is also important to realize that as the size of scale-up domains increases and as the speed of scale-up interconnect grows as well, the TAM of scale-up interconnect (and eventually, scale-up CPO) has already considerably dwarfed that of scale-out networking. CPO TAM is likely to be dominated by scale-up rather than scale-out networking applications.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: It is also important to realize that as the size of scale-up domains increases and as the speed of scale-up interconnect grows as well, the TAM of scale-up interconnect (and eventually, scale-up CPO) has already considerably dwarfed that of scale-out networking. CPO TAM is likely to be dominated by scale-up rather than scale-out networking applications.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: It is also important to realize that as the size of scale-up domains increases and as the speed of scale-up interconnect grows as well, the TAM of scale-up interconnect (and eventually, scale-up CPO) has already considerably dwarfed that of scale-out networking. CPO TAM is likely to be dominated by scale-up rather than scale-out networking applications.

pro.text: 还需认识到，随着纵向扩展域规模不断扩大以及纵向扩展互连速度持续提升，纵向扩展互连（最终是纵向扩展共封装光学）的总可寻址市场已经大幅超过横向扩展网络。CPO的总可寻址市场预计将主要由纵向扩展而非横向扩展网络应用主导。

paragraphs.source: Currently, scale up networks run entirely on copper for good reasons. Matching NVLink bandwidth with optical transceivers in the current pluggable paradigm would be prohibitively expensive in terms of cost and power as well as introducing unwanted latency. There also might not be sufficient face-plate space on the compute tray to even fit all of these transceivers. Copper excels at these low-latency, high-throughput connections. However, as mentioned above, copper’s limited reach restricts the “world size”—the number of GPUs that can be connected within a single scale-up domain.

Matching NVLink bandwidth with optical transceivers in the current pluggable paradigm would be prohibitively expensive in terms of cost and power as well as introducing unwanted latency. There also might not be sufficient face-plate space on the compute tray to even fit all of these transceivers. Copper excels at these low-latency, high-throughput connections. However, as mentioned above, copper’s limited reach restricts the “world size”—the number of GPUs that can be connected within a single scale-up domain.

pro.text: 目前，纵向扩展网络完全采用铜缆是有充分理由的。在当前可插拔光模块的范式下，要匹配NVLink的带宽，使用光收发器在成本和功耗上都高得令人望而却步，还会引入额外的延迟。此外，计算托盘的面面板可能也没有足够空间来容纳所有这些收发器。铜缆在实现这些低延迟、高吞吐量的连接方面表现出色。不过，如前所述，铜缆的有限传输距离限制了“世界规模”——即能够在单个纵向扩展域内互连的GPU数量。

paragraphs.source: Nvidia will continue to persist with copper. They also need to push their scale up world size even higher to keep ahead of competitors such as AMD and the hyperscalers who are catching up with their own scale up networks. As such, Nvidia is forced to go to drastic lengths to expand the scale up domain within a single rack. Nvidia’s extreme Kyber rack architecture for Rubin Ultra that was shown at GTC 2025 can scale up to 144 GPU packages (576 GPU dies). This rack is 4x denser than the already dense GB200/300 NVL72 rack. With the GB200 already being so complicated to manufacture and deploy, Kyber takes it to the next level.

pro.text: 英伟达将继续坚持使用铜缆。他们还需要进一步提升纵向扩展的规模，以保持对AMD和正在追赶的自研纵向扩展网络的超大规模云厂商等竞争对手的优势。因此，英伟达只能竭尽全力在单个机架内扩展纵向扩展域。英伟达在GTC 2025上展示的用于Rubin Ultra的极端Kyber机架架构可扩展至144个GPU封装（576个GPU裸片）。该机架的密度是已经很密集的GB200/300 NVL72机架的4倍。由于GB200的制造和部署已经极为复杂，Kyber更是将其推向了新的高度。

paragraphs.source: Optics enables the opposite approach, scaling across multiple racks to increase world size, rather than packing more accelerators in a dense footprint which is challenging for power delivery and thermal density. This is possible with pluggable transceivers today, but again the costs of optical transceivers along with their high power consumption makes this impractical.

pro.text: 光学方案则采用了相反的方法，通过跨多个机架扩展来增加世界规模，而不是在密集空间内塞入更多加速器——后者对供电和热密度而言极具挑战。目前使用可插拔收发器可以实现这一点，但光收发器的成本及其高功耗再次使其变得不切实际。

paragraphs.source: Scaling bandwidth on copper is also increasingly difficult. With Rubin, Nvidia is achieving the doubling of bandwidth by implementing a novel bi-directional SerDes technology, where both transmit and receive operations share the same channel, enabling full-duplex communication at 224Gbit/s transmit + 224Gbit/s receive per channel. Achieving “true” 448G per lane on copper remains another challenging feat with an uncertain time to market. In contrast, CPO presents multiple vectors for scaling bandwidth: Baud rate, DWDM, Additional Fiber Pairs and Modulation – all of which will be discussed in detail later in this article.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Scaling bandwidth on copper is also increasingly difficult. With Rubin, Nvidia is achieving the doubling of bandwidth by implementing a novel bi-directional SerDes technology, where both transmit and receive operations share the same channel, enabling full-duplex communication at 224Gbit/s transmit + 224Gbit/s receive per channel. Achieving “true” 448G per lane on copper remains another challenging feat with an uncertain time to market. In contrast, CPO presents multiple vectors for scaling bandwidth: Baud rate, DWDM, Additional Fiber Pairs and Modulation – all of which will be discussed in detail later in this article.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Scaling bandwidth on copper is also increasingly difficult. With Rubin, Nvidia is achieving the doubling of bandwidth by implementing a novel bi-directional SerDes technology, where both transmit and receive operations share the same channel, enabling full-duplex communication at 224Gbit/s transmit + 224Gbit/s receive per channel. Achieving “true” 448G per lane on copper remains another challenging feat with an uncertain time to market. In contrast, CPO presents multiple vectors for scaling bandwidth: Baud rate, DWDM, Additional Fiber Pairs and Modulation – all of which will be discussed in detail later in this article.

pro.text: 在铜缆上扩展带宽也变得越来越困难。在Rubin架构中，英伟达通过采用新型双向SerDes技术实现了带宽翻倍，即发送和接收操作共享同一通道，从而在每个通道实现224Gbit/s发送+224Gbit/s接收的全双工通信。在铜缆上实现“真正”的每通道448G仍是一项极具挑战性的任务，量产时间尚不确定。相比之下，共封装光学（CPO）提供了多种带宽扩展途径：波特率、密集波分复用（DWDM）、额外光纤对以及调制方式——所有这些将在本文后续部分详细讨论。

sections.title: When will CPO be ready for Primetime?

paragraphs.source: So, if CPO is the solution, why is Nvidia not pursuing it for Rubin Ultra and only for their scale out switches at first? This goes back to supply chain immaturity, manufacturing challenges, and customer hesitation around deployment. The Quantum and Spectrum CPO switches have been introduced to help ramp up the supply chain and get more real world data on reliability and serviceability in the datacenter.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: So, if CPO is the solution, why is Nvidia not pursuing it for Rubin Ultra and only for their scale out switches at first? This goes back to supply chain immaturity, manufacturing challenges, and customer hesitation around deployment. The Quantum and Spectrum CPO switches have been introduced to help ramp up the supply chain and get more real world data on reliability and serviceability in the datacenter.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: So, if CPO is the solution, why is Nvidia not pursuing it for Rubin Ultra and only for their scale out switches at first? This goes back to supply chain immaturity, manufacturing challenges, and customer hesitation around deployment. The Quantum and Spectrum CPO switches have been introduced to help ramp up the supply chain and get more real world data on reliability and serviceability in the datacenter.

pro.text: 那么，如果共封装光学（CPO）是解决方案，为什么英伟达不在Rubin Ultra中使用它，而只是首先将其用于横向扩展交换机？这主要是因为供应链尚不成熟、制造面临诸多挑战，以及客户对实际部署仍持观望态度。Quantum和Spectrum CPO交换机的推出，正是为了帮助供应链爬坡，并获取更多关于数据中心可靠性和可维护性的真实世界数据。

pro.text: 该论文还解释道，在测试期间，链路中没有观察到任何故障或不可纠正码字（UCW），整个测试期间（累计高达1,049k个400G端口设备小时）仅观察到一次FEC bin大于10的情况。

paragraphs.source: Meta did not stop there, however. In the talk at ECOC presenting the same paper, they presented expanded results for up to 15M 400G port-device hours. These results showed that there were no UCWs for the first 4M 400G port device hours, and they also showed a 0.5-1M device hour mean time before failure (MTBF) for 400G 2xFR4 transceivers (550k for 2xFR4 globally) vs 2.6M device hour MTBF for CPO.

These results showed that there were no UCWs for the first 4M 400G port device hours, and they also showed a 0.5-1M device hour mean time before failure (MTBF) for 400G 2xFR4 transceivers (550k for 2xFR4 globally) vs 2.6M device hour MTBF for CPO.

These results showed that there were no UCWs for the first 4M 400G port device hours, and they also showed a 0.5-1M device hour mean time before failure (MTBF) for 400G 2xFR4 transceivers (550k for 2xFR4 globally) vs 2.6M device hour MTBF for CPO.

pro.text:
**修订后的译文：**

然而，Meta并未止步于此。在ECOC会议上发表同一篇论文的演讲中，他们公布了扩展至15M个400G端口设备小时的结果。这些结果显示，在前4M个400G端口设备小时内没有出现UCW，同时还显示400G 2xFR4收发器的平均无故障时间（MTBF）为0.5-1M设备小时（全球2xFR4为550k），而CPO的MTBF为2.6M设备小时。

paragraphs.source: While 15M port device hours might sound like a large number, this is in units of 400G port hours. So – one 51.2T switch operated for one hour would mean 128 400G port hours. 15M 400G Port hours across 15 51.2T switches would mean 7,812 wall-clock hours or about 325 days. Indeed, this 15M hour number is often cited as simply “hours” or “device hours” with the “port” part left out. While the zero failure and zero UCW statistic up to 4M port device hours is very helpful – the industry needs far more than just 15 CPO switches tested for 11 months in a lab setting before it pivots towards CPO scale-out switching and commits billions of dollars to this technology.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: While 15M port device hours might sound like a large number, this is in units of 400G port hours. So – one 51.2T switch operated for one hour would mean 128 400G port hours. 15M 400G Port hours across 15 51.2T switches would mean 7,812 wall-clock hours or about 325 days. Indeed, this 15M hour number is often cited as simply “hours” or “device hours” with the “port” part left out. While the zero failure and zero UCW statistic up to 4M port device hours is very helpful – the industry needs far more than just 15 CPO switches tested for 11 months in a lab setting before it pivots towards CPO scale-out switching and commits billions of dollars to this technology.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: While 15M port device hours might sound like a large number, this is in units of 400G port hours. So – one 51.2T switch operated for one hour would mean 128 400G port hours. 15M 400G Port hours across 15 51.2T switches would mean 7,812 wall-clock hours or about 325 days. Indeed, this 15M hour number is often cited as simply “hours” or “device hours” with the “port” part left out. While the zero failure and zero UCW statistic up to 4M port device hours is very helpful – the industry needs far more than just 15 CPO switches tested for 11 months in a lab setting before it pivots towards CPO scale-out switching and commits billions of dollars to this technology.

pro.text: 虽然15M端口设备小时听起来是一个很大的数字，但其单位是400G端口小时。因此，一台51.2T交换机运行一小时相当于128个400G端口小时。15台51.2T交换机累计15M个400G端口小时，相当于7812个实际运行小时，约325天。事实上，这个15M小时的数字经常被简称为“小时”或“设备小时”，而省略了“端口”部分。虽然在4M端口设备小时内零故障和零UCW的统计数据非常有帮助，但行业需要在将目光转向CPO横向扩展交换机并投入数十亿美元之前，获得远超15台CPO交换机在实验室中测试11个月的更多数据。

paragraphs.source: Operating thousands of scale-out switches in a dynamic field environment is entirely different challenge and it remains to be seen how these switches will perform in a production environment. Temperature variation could be higher in a production environment vs a lab, leading to unanticipated variation in component performance or endurance. Meta’s own Llama 3 paper cited 1-2% temperature variations in the datacenter adversely affecting power consumption fluctuations – could such fluctuations affect an entire network fabric in ways that are hard to anticipate?

inline_elements.text: Meta’s own Llama 3 paper cited 1-2% temperature variations in the datacenter

Temperature variation could be higher in a production environment vs a lab, leading to unanticipated variation in component performance or endurance. [Meta’s own Llama 3 paper cited 1-2% temperature variations in the datacenter](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2407.21783) adversely affecting power consumption fluctuations – could such fluctuations affect an entire network fabric in ways that are hard to anticipate?

pro.text: 在动态的现场环境中运行数千台横向扩展交换机是完全不同的挑战，这些交换机在生产环境中的表现仍有待观察。生产环境中的温度波动可能高于实验室环境，从而导致元件性能或耐久性出现意料之外的变化。Meta自己的Llama 3论文提到数据中心存在1-2%的温度波动，这会对功耗波动产生不利影响——这种波动是否会以难以预料的方式影响整个网络结构？

paragraphs.source: Even mundane sounding problems like dust in a datacenter are the bane of support technicians who can spend considerable time cleaning fiber ends – of course, CPO switches have either an LC or MPO type front pluggable connector, but what about dust inside of the CPO switch chassis? The 0.06% unserviceable failure rate sounds attractive, but such failures have a blast radius of 64 800G ports. This paper is also focused on FR optics based CPO switches, though the next generation of CPO switches will be based on DR optics. These are just a few known unknowns, and there are potentially more unknown unknowns that could come up in field testing.

The 0.06% unserviceable failure rate sounds attractive, but such failures have a blast radius of 64 800G ports. These are just a few known unknowns, and there are potentially more unknown unknowns that could come up in field testing.

The 0.06% unserviceable failure rate sounds attractive, but such failures have a blast radius of 64 800G ports. This paper is also focused on FR optics based CPO switches, though the next generation of CPO switches will be based on DR optics. These are just a few known unknowns, and there are potentially more unknown unknowns that could come up in field testing.

pro.text: 即使是听起来平淡无奇的问题，例如数据中心内的灰尘，也让支持技术人员苦不堪言，他们需要花费大量时间清洁光纤端面。当然，CPO交换机前端有LC或MPO类型的可插拔连接器，但CPO交换机机箱内部的灰尘又该如何处理？0.06%的不可维护故障率听起来很有吸引力，但此类故障的影响范围（blast radius）为64个800G端口。本文主要关注基于FR光学的CPO交换机，而下一代CPO交换机将基于DR光学。这些只是已知的未知数，在现场测试中还可能出现更多未知的未知数。

paragraphs.source: Indeed, these results have been impactful in terms of convincing those in the industry by delivering tangible reliability data. Our point here is not to create fear, uncertainty or doubt (FUD) but rather to call for even larger scale field testing so that the industry can quickly understand and solve unforeseen problems thereby paving the way for broader CPO adoption, particularly for scale-up networking.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Indeed, these results have been impactful in terms of convincing those in the industry by delivering tangible reliability data. Our point here is not to create fear, uncertainty or doubt (FUD) but rather to call for even larger scale field testing so that the industry can quickly understand and solve unforeseen problems thereby paving the way for broader CPO adoption, particularly for scale-up networking.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Indeed, these results have been impactful in terms of convincing those in the industry by delivering tangible reliability data. Our point here is not to create fear, uncertainty or doubt (FUD) but rather to call for even larger scale field testing so that the industry can quickly understand and solve unforeseen problems thereby paving the way for broader CPO adoption, particularly for scale-up networking.

pro.text: 诚然，这些结果通过提供切实的可靠性数据，对说服行业人士产生了重要影响。我们在此的目的并非制造恐惧、不确定性和怀疑（FUD），而是呼吁进行更大规模的现场测试，以便行业能够快速理解和解决意外问题，从而为共封装光学（CPO）的更广泛采用铺平道路，尤其是在纵向扩展网络中。

paragraphs.source: At the end of the day, Nvidia’s scale-out CPO product launch is serving as a practice run and pipe-cleaner for the real high-volume deployment. We think deployment will be far more sizable and impactful for scale up given the much more compelling TCO and Performance/TCO benefit for scale-up vs scale-out.

pro.text: 归根结底，英伟达的横向扩展共封装光学（CPO）产品发布，主要起到实战验证和供应链打通的作用，为后续真正的大规模部署做准备。我们认为，CPO在纵向扩展领域的部署规模将远超横向扩展，因为其在总体拥有成本（TCO）和性能/TCO方面的优势，在纵向扩展场景中要显著得多。

paragraphs.source: Moreover - when it comes to scale-out CPO, Rubin Ultra is targeting a launch in 2027 (we think that ends up being late 2027) and the supply chain won’t be ready to ship tens of millions of these CPO endpoints to support GPU demand. Even this timeline is too ambitious for Nvidia. This is why the Feynman generation appears to be the focal point for CPO injection into the Nvidia ecosystem.

pro.text: 此外，就横向扩展CPO而言，Rubin Ultra计划于2027年推出（我们预计实际落地时间可能推迟至2027年下半年），而供应链届时还无法量产数千万个CPO端点来满足GPU需求。即使这个时间表对英伟达来说也过于激进。这正是Feynman一代成为英伟达生态系统中CPO切入重点的原因。

sections.title: What is CPO about and why is everyone so excited?
sections.title_translation: CPO究竟是什么？业界为何如此兴奋？

paragraphs.source: CPO integrates optical engines directly within the same package or module as high-performance computing or networking ASICs. These optical engines convert electrical signals into optical signals, enabling high-speed data transmission over optical links. Optical links must be used for data communication over distances beyond a few meters, as high-speed electrical communication over copper cannot reach beyond a few meters.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: **CPO** integrates optical engines directly within the same package or module as high-performance computing or networking ASICs. These optical engines convert electrical signals into optical signals, enabling high-speed data transmission over optical links. Optical links must be used for data communication over distances beyond a few meters, as high-speed electrical communication over copper cannot reach beyond a few meters.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: CPO integrates optical engines directly within the same package or module as high-performance computing or networking ASICs. These optical engines convert electrical signals into optical signals, enabling high-speed data transmission over optical links. Optical links must be used for data communication over distances beyond a few meters, as high-speed electrical communication over copper cannot reach beyond a few meters.

pro.text: 共封装光学（CPO）将光引擎直接集成于高性能计算或网络ASIC的同一封装或模块内。这些光引擎负责将电信号转换为光信号，从而实现光链路的高速数据传输。传输距离超过几米时，必须采用光链路，因为铜缆高速电通信无法逾越几米。
