paragraphs.source: Overall, Celestial AI has been working to innovate its custom links – they don’t rely on any gearbox components, offering better latency and power efficiency, and are adaptive to different types of protocols. As mentioned earlier, Celestial AI is the only major player that is mainly using EAMs for modulation. One key implication is that they will also have some work ahead of them integrating their EAM design into a foundry whereas other CPO companies can lean on TSMC COUPE where MRMs and related heaters are already part of the PDK.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Overall, Celestial AI has been working to innovate its custom links – they don’t rely on any gearbox components, offering better latency and power efficiency, and are adaptive to different types of protocols. As mentioned earlier, Celestial AI is the only major player that is mainly using EAMs for modulation. One key implication is that they will also have some work ahead of them integrating their EAM design into a foundry whereas other CPO companies can lean on TSMC COUPE where MRMs and related heaters are already part of the PDK.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Overall, Celestial AI has been working to innovate its custom links – they don’t rely on any gearbox components, offering better latency and power efficiency, and are adaptive to different types of protocols. As mentioned earlier, Celestial AI is the only major player that is mainly using EAMs for modulation. One key implication is that they will also have some work ahead of them integrating their EAM design into a foundry whereas other CPO companies can lean on TSMC COUPE where MRMs and related heaters are already part of the PDK.

pro.text: 总体而言，Celestial AI一直致力于创新其定制链路——它们不依赖任何齿轮箱组件，从而提供更好的延迟和能效，并且能够适配不同类型的协议。如前所述，Celestial AI是唯一主要采用EAM进行调制的厂商。关键影响之一是，他们还需要投入精力将EAM设计集成到晶圆代工厂工艺中，而其他共封装光学（CPO）厂商则可以依托台积电COUPE，其中MRM及相关加热器已纳入工艺设计套件（PDK）。

paragraphs.source: In the immediate term, Celestial AI is committing to an ambitious timeline for the release of the chiplet. Marvell announced in the transaction summary that their estimated revenue run rate from Celestial at the end of January 2028 (the end of Marvell’s Fiscal Year 2028 – i.e. F1/28) is expected to reach $500 million. At the Barclay’s Global Technology Conference, they further added that this run rate is expected to double to $1B by the end of Calendar Year 2028 (with most of CY28 falling into Marvell’s FY ending Jan 2029 – i.e. F1/29), implying a 2-year period from now to the end of 2027 for the product to achieve commercial viability.

Marvell announced in the transaction summary that their estimated revenue run rate from Celestial at the end of January 2028 (the end of Marvell’s Fiscal Year 2028 – i.e. F1/28) is expected to reach $500 million. At the Barclay’s Global Technology Conference, they further added that this run rate is expected to double to $1B by the end of Calendar Year 2028 (with most of CY28 falling into Marvell’s FY ending Jan 2029 – i.e. F1/29), implying a 2-year period from now to the end of 2027 for the product to achieve commercial viability.

At the Barclay’s Global Technology Conference, they further added that this run rate is expected to double to $1B by the end of Calendar Year 2028 (with most of CY28 falling into Marvell’s FY ending Jan 2029 – i.e. F1/29), implying a 2-year period from now to the end of 2027 for the product to achieve commercial viability.

pro.text: 短期内，Celestial AI承诺为芯粒发布制定雄心勃勃的时间表。Marvell在交易摘要中宣布，预计到2028年1月底（即Marvell 2028财年结束，也称F1/28），来自Celestial的营收运行率将达到5亿美元。在巴克莱全球科技会议上，他们进一步表示，该运行率预计到2028年日历年年底将翻番至10亿美元（大部分2028日历年落在Marvell截至2029年1月的财年，即F1/29），这意味着从当前到2027年底约两年的时间内，产品需要实现商业化。

paragraphs.source: As part of the deal terms, an additional $2.25B of payout to Celestial AI’s equity holders is contingent upon the company achieving a cumulative revenue of at least $2.0 billion by January 2029 (the end of Marvell’s Fiscal Year 2029 – i.e. F1/29). This first milestone towards that full payout is achieving $500M of cumulative revenue by January 2029 for one third of the payout. The $1B revenue run rate expected exiting F1/29 is half of the earn-out amount – implying that Celestial will need to add additional customers to the order book to achieve the $2B earn-out target.

pro.text: 根据交易条款，额外22.5亿美元的支付将支付给Celestial AI的股权持有人，其前提是公司在2029年1月（Marvell 2029财年结束，即F1/29）前实现累计营收至少20亿美元。其中第一个里程碑是在2029年1月前实现5亿美元累计营收，即可获得总支付额的三分之一。预计F1/29财年末10亿美元的营收运行率仅为earn-out金额的一半——这意味着Celestial AI需要增加更多客户订单，才能达成20亿美元的earn-out目标。

paragraphs.source: In connection with the Celestial AI acquisition, Marvell filed an 8-K report on December 2, 2025 issuing Amazon warrants with an exercise price of $87.0029 through December 31, 2030. These warrants vest “based on Amazon’s purchases of Photonic Fabric products, indirectly or directly, through December 31, 2030”, strongly suggesting that AWS’s Trainium will be the target product as this starts to ramp in late 2027. At Marvell’s Industry Analyst Day, Celestial AI discussed how a major hyperscaler selected them for optical interconnectivity for advanced AI systems that will move into volume production in that hyperscaler’s next generation processor.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: In connection with the Celestial AI acquisition, Marvell filed an [8-K report](https://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/1835632/000119312525305271/d81371d8k.htm) on December 2, 2025 issuing Amazon warrants with an exercise price of $87.0029 through December 31, 2030. These warrants vest “based on Amazon’s purchases of Photonic Fabric products, indirectly or directly, through December 31, 2030”, strongly suggesting that AWS’s Trainium will be the target product as this starts to ramp in late 2027. At Marvell’s Industry Analyst Day, Celestial AI discussed how a major hyperscaler selected them for optical interconnectivity for advanced AI systems that will move into volume production in that hyperscaler’s next generation processor. This, together with the earn-out timing and product revenue guidance in the transaction summary suggests that Celestial AI is targeting to deploy its solution within Trainium 4.

These warrants vest “based on Amazon’s purchases of Photonic Fabric products, indirectly or directly, through December 31, 2030”, strongly suggesting that AWS’s Trainium will be the target product as this starts to ramp in late 2027. At Marvell’s Industry Analyst Day, Celestial AI discussed how a major hyperscaler selected them for optical interconnectivity for advanced AI systems that will move into volume production in that hyperscaler’s next generation processor. This, together with the earn-out timing and product revenue guidance in the transaction summary suggests that Celestial AI is targeting to deploy its solution within Trainium 4.

pro.text: 在收购Celestial AI的相关事宜中，Marvell于2025年12月2日提交了8-K报告，发行了亚马逊认股权证，行权价格为87.0029美元，行权期至2030年12月31日。这些认股权证的归属“基于亚马逊在2030年12月31日前直接或间接购买光子织物（Photonic Fabric）产品的数量”，强烈表明AWS的Trainium将是目标产品，因为该产品预计将于2027年底开始量产。在Marvell的行业分析师日活动中，Celestial AI谈到一家大型超大规模云厂商选择他们为其下一代处理器中的先进AI系统提供光互连，该产品将进入量产阶段。

paragraphs.source: Let’s conclude our discussion on Celestial AI by elaborating further on its first scale-up solutions to come to market which will be oriented around its 16Tbit/s Photonics Link that will be connected to a chiplet. An FAU is connected to the channel waveguides via the grating coupler. A Scale-up switch ASIC – possibly Marvell’s 115.2T scale-up ASIC – will be optically connected to an XPU via the Photonics link and the PF chiplet. Though Celestial expects most of its initial go-to-market revenue to be contributed by its chiplet, it positions itself as a systems company and has pitched several optical-based memory expansion solutions that can come to market after this first scale-up networking solution.

pro.text: 让我们通过进一步阐述其即将面市的首个纵向扩展解决方案来结束对Celestial AI的讨论。该方案将围绕其16Tbit/s光子链路构建，并连接到一个芯粒。FAU通过光栅耦合器与通道波导相连。一个纵向扩展网络交换机ASIC（可能是Marvell的115.2T纵向扩展ASIC）将通过光子链路和PF芯粒与XPU实现光学连接。虽然Celestial AI预计其初期上市营收主要来自芯粒，但它将自身定位为一家系统公司，并已提出几种基于光学的内存扩展解决方案，这些方案可在首个纵向扩展网络解决方案之后推向市场。

paragraphs.source: Using optics to increase the scale-up world size through multiple switch layers is not a new concept, though of course it has yet to come close to being productized. Such a concept could have topologies that mirror the NVL576 concept of the GB200, where there are two switch layers and each switch layer is connected to the other via OSFP transceiver modules and optical fiber. Celestial AI’s approach of using multiple switch layers is similar but skips the use of actual transceivers.

Such a concept could have topologies that mirror the NVL576 concept of the GB200, where there are two switch layers and each switch layer is connected to the other via OSFP transceiver modules and optical fiber. Celestial AI’s approach of using multiple switch layers is similar but skips the use of actual transceivers.

Celestial AI’s approach of using multiple switch layers is similar but skips the use of actual transceivers.

pro.text: 利用光学技术通过多层交换机来扩大纵向扩展世界规模并非新概念，尽管它距离真正产品化仍有差距。这种概念可能采用类似于GB200的NVL576的拓扑结构，其中存在两层交换机，每层交换机之间通过OSFP收发器模块和光纤连接。Celestial AI采用多层交换机的方法与之类似，但省去了实际收发器的使用。

paragraphs.source: The biggest difference from the NVL576 concept, however, is that the scale-up ASIC can double as both a router and a memory endpoint, whereas an NVSwitch only routes high-bandwidth links between GPUs. This is an important distinction because Celestial AI’s pitch is that its scale-up solution is able to sidestep the silicon beachfront constraint that limits the number of HBM stacks one can attach to the XPU.

paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The biggest difference from the NVL576 concept, however, is that the scale-up ASIC can double as both a router and a memory endpoint, whereas an NVSwitch only routes high-bandwidth links between GPUs. This is an important distinction because Celestial AI’s pitch is that its scale-up solution is able to sidestep the silicon beachfront constraint that limits the number of HBM stacks one can attach to the XPU.

pro.text: 然而，与NVL576概念最大的不同在于，纵向扩展ASIC可以同时兼任路由器和内存端点，而NVSwitch仅在GPU之间路由高带宽链路。这一区别非常重要，因为Celestial AI的核心主张是，其纵向扩展解决方案能够规避前沿约束（beachfront constraint），该约束限制了可连接到XPU的HBM堆叠数量。

paragraphs.source: To achieve this, the HBM stack attached to the XPU is replaced with a chiplet that connects to the Photonic Fabric, which is a shared HBM pool. The shared HBM pool is a Photonic Fabric Appliance (PFA) a 2U-rack-mountable system made up of 16 Photonic Fabric ASICs consisting of one port each.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: To achieve this, the HBM stack attached to the XPU is replaced with a chiplet that connects to the Photonic Fabric, which is a shared HBM pool. The shared HBM pool is a Photonic Fabric Appliance (PFA) a 2U-rack-mountable system made up of 16 Photonic Fabric ASICs consisting of one port each.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: To achieve this, the HBM stack attached to the XPU is replaced with a chiplet that connects to the Photonic Fabric, which is a shared HBM pool. The shared HBM pool is a Photonic Fabric Appliance (PFA) a 2U-rack-mountable system made up of 16 Photonic Fabric ASICs consisting of one port each.

pro.text: 为实现这一目标，连接到XPU的HBM堆叠被替换为一个芯粒，该芯粒连接到光子织物，后者是一个共享HBM池。共享HBM池即光子织物设备（Photonic Fabric Appliance，PFA），这是一个可安装在2U机架上的系统，由16个光子织物ASIC组成，每个ASIC包含一个端口。

paragraphs.source: Zooming out, each PFA module is a 16-radix switch that can support up to 16 XPUs. Rather than have each XPU fan-out to all 16 ports, all-to-all connectivity occurs inside the switch box, where the Fiber Attach Unit (FAU) connected to each Switch ASIC fans out to each of the 16 switch I/Os. As such, every XPU only has one Fiber link to one switch port outside of the box.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Zooming out, each PFA module is a 16-radix switch that can support up to 16 XPUs. Rather than have each XPU fan-out to all 16 ports, all-to-all connectivity occurs inside the switch box, where the Fiber Attach Unit (FAU) connected to each Switch ASIC fans out to each of the 16 switch I/Os. As such, every XPU only has one Fiber link to one switch port outside of the box.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Zooming out, each PFA module is a 16-radix switch that can support up to 16 XPUs. Rather than have each XPU fan-out to all 16 ports, all-to-all connectivity occurs inside the switch box, where the Fiber Attach Unit (FAU) connected to each Switch ASIC fans out to each of the 16 switch I/Os. As such, every XPU only has one Fiber link to one switch port outside of the box.

pro.text: 从整体来看，每个PFA模块都是一个16基数交换机，最多可支持16个XPU。系统并非让每个XPU都扇出到全部16个端口，而是将所有对所有连接发生在交换机机箱内部，其中连接到每个交换机ASIC的光纤连接单元（Fiber Attach Unit，FAU）扇出至16个交换机I/O。因此，每个XPU仅需一条光纤链路连接到机箱外的一个交换机端口。

paragraphs.source: The first solution to come to market will be optical engines for Near Packaged Optics (NPO) in 2026/2027. In an NPO solution, the Optical Engine would be soldered to the baseboard, with copper connecting LR SerDes on the XPU to the Optical Engine. Lightmatter’s optical engine will support up to 3 FAUs with 40 fiber strands per FAU, for a total of 120 fiber strands. The NPO strategy is premised on the idea that Hyperscalers’ first step in adopting CPO will be to first gain operational experience with NPO, which derisks the product given the Hyperscaler need not “commit” to CPO as it can elect to ultimately use either optical or copper scale-up solutions to interface with LR SerDes on the XPU or switch.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The first solution to come to market will be optical engines for Near Packaged Optics (NPO) in 2026/2027. In an NPO solution, the Optical Engine would be soldered to the baseboard, with copper connecting LR SerDes on the XPU to the Optical Engine. Lightmatter’s optical engine will support up to 3 FAUs with 40 fiber strands per FAU, for a total of 120 fiber strands. The NPO strategy is premised on the idea that Hyperscalers’ first step in adopting CPO will be to first gain operational experience with NPO, which derisks the product given the Hyperscaler need not “commit” to CPO as it can elect to ultimately use either optical or copper scale-up solutions to interface with LR SerDes on the XPU or switch.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The first solution to come to market will be optical engines for Near Packaged Optics (NPO) in 2026/2027. In an NPO solution, the Optical Engine would be soldered to the baseboard, with copper connecting LR SerDes on the XPU to the Optical Engine. Lightmatter’s optical engine will support up to 3 FAUs with 40 fiber strands per FAU, for a total of 120 fiber strands. The NPO strategy is premised on the idea that Hyperscalers’ first step in adopting CPO will be to first gain operational experience with NPO, which derisks the product given the Hyperscaler need not “commit” to CPO as it can elect to ultimately use either optical or copper scale-up solutions to interface with LR SerDes on the XPU or switch.

pro.text:
**修订后的译文：**

首个将推向市场的解决方案是2026/2027年的近封装光学（NPO）光引擎。在NPO方案中，光引擎将焊接到底板上，通过铜线将XPU上的LR SerDes连接至光引擎。Lightmatter的光引擎最多支持3个FAU，每个FAU含40根光纤，总计120根光纤。NPO策略基于以下前提：超大规模云服务商在采用共封装光学（CPO）前，会先通过NPO积累运营经验。此举可降低产品风险，因为他们无需“承诺”采用CPO，最终仍可选择使用光学或铜缆纵向扩展方案来对接XPU或交换机上的LR SerDes。

paragraphs.source: As Lightmatter’s optical engine solution is based on TSMC COUPE and the GF 45nm SPCLO process, many vectors of scaling are on the table. In addition to delivering 200Gbit/s (uni-directional) per lane via 100Gbaud PAM4, it can also support 200Gbit/s on PAM4 with DWDM8 or 100Gbit/s on PAM4 using DWDM16 to achieve 3.2T per fiber.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: As Lightmatter’s optical engine solution is based on TSMC COUPE and the GF 45nm SPCLO process, many vectors of scaling are on the table. In addition to delivering 200Gbit/s (uni-directional) per lane via 100Gbaud PAM4, it can also support 200Gbit/s on PAM4 with DWDM8 or 100Gbit/s on PAM4 using DWDM16 to achieve 3.2T per fiber.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: As Lightmatter’s optical engine solution is based on TSMC COUPE and the GF 45nm SPCLO process, many vectors of scaling are on the table. In addition to delivering 200Gbit/s (uni-directional) per lane via 100Gbaud PAM4, it can also support 200Gbit/s on PAM4 with DWDM8 or 100Gbit/s on PAM4 using DWDM16 to achieve 3.2T per fiber.

pro.text: 由于Lightmatter的光引擎方案基于台积电COUPE和GF 45nm SPCLO工艺，存在多种扩展路径。除了通过100Gbaud PAM4实现每通道200Gbit/s（单向）之外，它还支持通过DWDM8在PAM4下实现每通道200Gbit/s，或通过DWDM16在PAM4下实现每通道100Gbit/s，进而使每根光纤达到3.2T带宽。

paragraphs.source: While some of the other CPO companies have opted to use the merchant laser source ecosystem, Lightmatter has developed its own external laser source known as GUIDE, which is currently sampling. While other laser sources singulate InP wafers to create discrete laser diodes, GUIDE, the industry’s first Very Large Scale Photonics (VLSP) laser, which is a new class of laser that integrates hundreds of InP lasers onto a single silicon chip to support up to 50 Tbit/s of bandwidth. Lightmatter claims to bring a unique control technology to manage these many InP lasers that also has the benefit of increasing overall reliability by overprovisioning the number of InP lasers and allowing “self repair” by swapping in still functioning diodes.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: While some of the other CPO companies have opted to use the merchant laser source ecosystem, Lightmatter has developed its own external laser source known as GUIDE, which is currently sampling. While other laser sources singulate InP wafers to create discrete laser diodes, GUIDE, the industry’s first Very Large Scale Photonics (VLSP) laser, which is a new class of laser that integrates hundreds of InP lasers onto a single silicon chip to support up to 50 Tbit/s of bandwidth. Lightmatter claims to bring a unique control technology to manage these many InP lasers that also has the benefit of increasing overall reliability by overprovisioning the number of InP lasers and allowing “self repair” by swapping in still functioning diodes. The Nvidia Quantum-X CPO Switch featuring 144 ports of 800G requires 18 ELSs, and Lightmatter claims that two GUIDE laser sources could cater to this same overall bandwidth requirements.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: While some of the other CPO companies have opted to use the merchant laser source ecosystem, Lightmatter has developed its own external laser source known as GUIDE, which is currently sampling. While other laser sources singulate InP wafers to create discrete laser diodes, GUIDE, the industry’s first Very Large Scale Photonics (VLSP) laser, which is a new class of laser that integrates hundreds of InP lasers onto a single silicon chip to support up to 50 Tbit/s of bandwidth. Lightmatter claims to bring a unique control technology to manage these many InP lasers that also has the benefit of increasing overall reliability by overprovisioning the number of InP lasers and allowing “self repair” by swapping in still functioning diodes. The Nvidia Quantum-X CPO Switch featuring 144 ports of 800G requires 18 ELSs, and Lightmatter claims that two GUIDE laser sources could cater to this same overall bandwidth requirements.

pro.text: 虽然其他一些共封装光学（CPO）公司选择使用商用激光源生态系统，但Lightmatter开发了名为GUIDE的自主外部激光源，目前正在送样。其他激光源通常将InP晶圆切割成独立的激光二极管，而GUIDE是业界首个超大规模光子学（VLSP）激光器，属于一类新型激光器，可将数百个InP激光器集成到单颗硅芯片上，最高支持50 Tbit/s带宽。Lightmatter声称其独有的控制技术能够管理这些大量InP激光器，同时通过超量配置InP激光器数量并允许通过切换仍在工作的二极管实现“自修复”，从而显著提升整体可靠性。

paragraphs.source: Lightmatter’s M1000 3D Photonic Superchip, is a 4,000 mm² optical interposer that is placed below the host compute engine and takes care of signal conversion from electrical to optical. The M1000 was demonstrated in a live rack-scale demonstration at SC25, and Lightmatter has made it available as a reference design. Passage uses TSVs to deliver electrical signals and power between the XPU and the optical engine, and uses SerDes to connect the two. By placing the ASIC directly on the optical interposer, Passage eliminates the need for large, power-hungry SerDes. Instead, it utilizes 1,024 compact, lower-power SerDes (~8x smaller than conventional SerDes) to enable a total I/O bandwidth of 114Tbit/s (each SerDes operating at 112Gbit/s).

inline_elements.text: demonstrated in a live rack-scale demonstration at SC25

paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Lightmatter’s M1000 3D Photonic Superchip, is a 4,000 mm² optical interposer that is placed below the host compute engine and takes care of signal conversion from electrical to optical. The M1000 was [demonstrated in a live rack-scale demonstration at SC25](https://youtu.be/Gjee92kYmwg?si=bP09-v5rALXtwOkY), and Lightmatter has made it available as a reference design. Passage uses TSVs to deliver electrical signals and power between the XPU and the optical engine, and uses SerDes to connect the two. By placing the ASIC directly on the optical interposer, Passage eliminates the need for large, power-hungry SerDes. Instead, it utilizes 1,024 compact, lower-power SerDes (~8x smaller than conventional SerDes) to enable a total I/O bandwidth of 114Tbit/s (each SerDes operating at 112Gbit/s). By placing the ASIC directly on top of the optical interposer, the chip shoreline constraint is also relieved.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Lightmatter’s M1000 3D Photonic Superchip, is a 4,000 mm² optical interposer that is placed below the host compute engine and takes care of signal conversion from electrical to optical. The M1000 was demonstrated in a live rack-scale demonstration at SC25, and Lightmatter has made it available as a reference design. Passage uses TSVs to deliver electrical signals and power between the XPU and the optical engine, and uses SerDes to connect the two. By placing the ASIC directly on the optical interposer, Passage eliminates the need for large, power-hungry SerDes. Instead, it utilizes 1,024 compact, lower-power SerDes (~8x smaller than conventional SerDes) to enable a total I/O bandwidth of 114Tbit/s (each SerDes operating at 112Gbit/s). By placing the ASIC directly on top of the optical interposer, the chip shoreline constraint is also relieved.

pro.text: Lightmatter的M1000 3D光子超级芯片是一块4000 mm²的光互连中介层，置于主机计算引擎下方，负责电信号到光信号的转换。M1000已在SC25展会上进行了机架级实时演示demonstrated in a live rack-scale demonstration at SC25，Lightmatter已将其作为参考设计对外提供。Passage利用TSV在XPU和光引擎之间传输电信号和电源，并使用SerDes连接两者。通过将ASIC直接置于光互连中介层上，Passage消除了对大功耗SerDes的需求，转而采用1024个紧凑、低功耗的SerDes（体积约为传统SerDes的1/8），从而实现总计114Tbit/s的I/O带宽（每个SerDes工作在112Gbit/s）。

paragraphs.source: The system incorporates built-in OCS that manages redundancies – if one communication route fails, traffic can be rerouted through an alternate path to ensure uninterrupted operation in such a large-scale system. Additionally, neighboring tiles are electrically stitched together, enabling them to communicate electronically using interfaces such as UCIe.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The system incorporates built-in OCS that manages redundancies – if one communication route fails, traffic can be rerouted through an alternate path to ensure uninterrupted operation in such a large-scale system. Additionally, neighboring tiles are electrically stitched together, enabling them to communicate electronically using interfaces such as UCIe.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The system incorporates built-in OCS that manages redundancies – if one communication route fails, traffic can be rerouted through an alternate path to ensure uninterrupted operation in such a large-scale system. Additionally, neighboring tiles are electrically stitched together, enabling them to communicate electronically using interfaces such as UCIe.

pro.text: 该系统集成了内置的光学电路交换（OCS），用于管理冗余——如果某条通信路径发生故障，流量可通过备用路径重新路由，从而确保在如此大规模系统中运行不中断。此外，相邻的tile通过电气方式拼接在一起，能够使用UCIe等接口进行电子通信。

paragraphs.source: Passage uses MRMs with diameters of ~15 µm, each integrated with a resistive heater, and achieves 56 Gbit/s NRZ modulation. The module consists of 16 horizontal buses, each capable of carrying up to 16 colors (wavelengths). These colors will be supplied by GUIDE, which delivers 16 wavelengths per fiber on a 200 GHz grid.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Passage uses MRMs with diameters of ~15 µm, each integrated with a resistive heater, and achieves 56 Gbit/s NRZ modulation. The module consists of 16 horizontal buses, each capable of carrying up to 16 colors (wavelengths). These colors will be supplied by GUIDE, which delivers 16 wavelengths per fiber on a 200 GHz grid.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Passage uses MRMs with diameters of ~15 µm, each integrated with a resistive heater, and achieves 56 Gbit/s NRZ modulation. The module consists of 16 horizontal buses, each capable of carrying up to 16 colors (wavelengths). These colors will be supplied by GUIDE, which delivers 16 wavelengths per fiber on a 200 GHz grid.

pro.text: Passage采用直径约15 µm的微环调制器（MRM），每个均集成电阻加热器，可实现56 Gbit/s NRZ调制。该模块包含16条水平总线，每条总线可承载最多16种颜色（波长）。这些颜色将由GUIDE提供，每根光纤在200 GHz间隔上可传送16个波长。

paragraphs.source: Passage utilizes 256 optical fibers, each carrying 16 wavelengths unidirectionally (or 8 wavelengths bi-directionally) via DWDM, delivering between 1 Tbit/s and 1.6 Tbit/s of bandwidth per fiber. To improve yield, they have minimized the number of fibers attached to the chip, reducing complexity and manufacturing challenges. Additionally, they have implemented a fiber attach system that allows faulty fibers to be easily disconnected from the panel and replaced, enhancing reliability and serviceability. The table below reflects the different modes that Passage supports currently.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Passage utilizes 256 optical fibers, each carrying 16 wavelengths unidirectionally (or 8 wavelengths bi-directionally) via DWDM, delivering between 1 Tbit/s and 1.6 Tbit/s of bandwidth per fiber. To improve yield, they have minimized the number of fibers attached to the chip, reducing complexity and manufacturing challenges. Additionally, they have implemented a fiber attach system that allows faulty fibers to be easily disconnected from the panel and replaced, enhancing reliability and serviceability. The table below reflects the different modes that Passage supports currently.

To improve yield, they have minimized the number of fibers attached to the chip, reducing complexity and manufacturing challenges. Additionally, they have implemented a fiber attach system that allows faulty fibers to be easily disconnected from the panel and replaced, enhancing reliability and serviceability. The table below reflects the different modes that Passage supports currently.

pro.text: Passage使用了256根光纤，每根光纤通过DWDM单向承载16个波长（或双向承载8个波长），每根光纤可提供1 Tbit/s至1.6 Tbit/s的带宽。为提高良率，他们将连接到芯片的光纤数量降至最低，从而降低了复杂度和制造难度。此外，他们还实施了一套光纤连接系统，允许将故障光纤从面板上轻松断开并更换，提升了可靠性和可维护性。下表反映了Passage当前支持的不同模式。

paragraphs.source: One of the key debates regarding PASSAGE is the thermal stability of the MRMs used given that the optical interposer is located directly beneath a very hot XPU. By comparison, other approaches to CPO do not envision the modulators being placed directly beneath the XPU, and as such are easier to thermally manage. In response to this point, Lightmatter has explained that the control loops used for MRMs in PASSAGE can handle 2,000C per second of excursion and can handle temperatures of between 0 to 105C – that is to say a 60 to 80C temperature transition could occur within 10ms without disrupting the optical links.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: One of the key debates regarding PASSAGE is the thermal stability of the MRMs used given that the optical interposer is located directly beneath a very hot XPU. By comparison, other approaches to CPO do not envision the modulators being placed directly beneath the XPU, and as such are easier to thermally manage. In response to this point, Lightmatter has explained that the control loops used for MRMs in PASSAGE can handle 2,000C per second of excursion and can handle temperatures of between 0 to 105C – that is to say a 60 to 80C temperature transition could occur within 10ms without disrupting the optical links.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: One of the key debates regarding PASSAGE is the thermal stability of the MRMs used given that the optical interposer is located directly beneath a very hot XPU. By comparison, other approaches to CPO do not envision the modulators being placed directly beneath the XPU, and as such are easier to thermally manage. In response to this point, Lightmatter has explained that the control loops used for MRMs in PASSAGE can handle 2,000C per second of excursion and can handle temperatures of between 0 to 105C – that is to say a 60 to 80C temperature transition could occur within 10ms without disrupting the optical links.

pro.text: 关于PASSAGE的一个关键争议在于其所用微环调制器（MRM）的热稳定性，因为光互连中介层直接位于温度很高的XPU下方。相比之下，其他共封装光学（CPO）方案并未将调制器直接置于XPU下方，因此热管理更为容易。针对这一问题，Lightmatter解释称，PASSAGE中用于MRM的控制环路能够承受2000°C/s的温度变化率，并可在0至105°C的温度范围内工作——也就是说，60至80°C的温度跃变可在10毫秒内发生，而不会中断光链路。

paragraphs.source: The SC25 demonstration video depicted an illustration of temperature variation of between 25C to 105C showing a wide range of operating temperatures, though this particular but with the 80C transition taking around one minute – for a fairly low 1.33C per second excursion, but a separate demonstration also at SC25 using an on-chip thermal aggressor reached the 2,000C/s rate, with the MRM stabilizer heater allowing a far lower range of -2 to +2 C/s at the MRM itself.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The [SC25 demonstration](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Gjee92kYmwg) video depicted an illustration of temperature variation of between 25C to 105C showing a wide range of operating temperatures, though this particular but with the 80C transition taking around one minute – for a fairly low 1.33C per second excursion, but a separate demonstration also at SC25 using an on-chip thermal aggressor reached the 2,000C/s rate, with the MRM stabilizer heater allowing a far lower range of -2 to +2 C/s at the MRM itself.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The SC25 demonstration video depicted an illustration of temperature variation of between 25C to 105C showing a wide range of operating temperatures, though this particular but with the 80C transition taking around one minute – for a fairly low 1.33C per second excursion, but a separate demonstration also at SC25 using an on-chip thermal aggressor reached the 2,000C/s rate, with the MRM stabilizer heater allowing a far lower range of -2 to +2 C/s at the MRM itself.

pro.text: SC25演示视频展示了一幅温度在25°C至105°C之间变化的示意图，表明其工作温度范围很宽，不过该演示中80°C的温度跃变耗时约一分钟，变化速率仅为较低的1.33°C/秒。而在SC25的另一场演示中，使用片上热干扰源达到了2000°C/秒的速率，此时MRM稳定加热器可将MRM本身的温度变化控制在-2至+2°C/秒的极小范围内。

paragraphs.source: Xscape Photonics is an innovative company that is working on ChromX, a programmable laser that offers 4 to 16 wavelengths, with plans to provide up to 128 wavelengths in the future. By offering up to 128 different colors, ChromX will be able achieve significantly higher bandwidth as compared to existing lasers that only offer 4 to 8 wavelengths. ChromX relies on an external III-V laser alongside an on-chip multicolor generator that helps to generate multiple wavelengths for WDM.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Xscape Photonics is an innovative company that is working on ChromX, a programmable laser that offers 4 to 16 wavelengths, with plans to provide up to 128 wavelengths in the future. By offering up to 128 different colors, ChromX will be able achieve significantly higher bandwidth as compared to existing lasers that only offer 4 to 8 wavelengths. ChromX relies on an external III-V laser alongside an on-chip multicolor generator that helps to generate multiple wavelengths for WDM.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Xscape Photonics is an innovative company that is working on ChromX, a programmable laser that offers 4 to 16 wavelengths, with plans to provide up to 128 wavelengths in the future. By offering up to 128 different colors, ChromX will be able achieve significantly higher bandwidth as compared to existing lasers that only offer 4 to 8 wavelengths. ChromX relies on an external III-V laser alongside an on-chip multicolor generator that helps to generate multiple wavelengths for WDM.

pro.text: Xscape Photonics是一家专注可编程激光技术的创新公司，其ChromX激光器目前可提供4至16个波长，并计划未来扩展至128个波长。通过提供多达128种不同颜色，ChromX将能实现远超现有仅提供4至8个波长激光器的带宽。ChromX依赖外部III-V激光器，并搭配片上多色发生器来产生用于波分复用（WDM）的多个波长。

paragraphs.source: The fact that the laser is programmable offers flexibility to provide wavelengths for different types of workloads to meet different bandwidth and distance requirements. Interestingly, their solution requires only one laser whereas existing CPO solutions require multiple lasers that have extremely high power and electricity consumption. Moreover, all wavelengths are carried over a single fiber which avoids the complexity that plagues most CPO systems that require multiple fibers significantly reducing fiber coupling issues.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The fact that the laser is programmable offers flexibility to provide wavelengths for different types of workloads to meet different bandwidth and distance requirements. Interestingly, their solution requires only one laser whereas existing CPO solutions require multiple lasers that have extremely high power and electricity consumption. Moreover, all wavelengths are carried over a single fiber which avoids the complexity that plagues most CPO systems that require multiple fibers significantly reducing fiber coupling issues.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The fact that the laser is programmable offers flexibility to provide wavelengths for different types of workloads to meet different bandwidth and distance requirements. Interestingly, their solution requires only one laser whereas existing CPO solutions require multiple lasers that have extremely high power and electricity consumption. Moreover, all wavelengths are carried over a single fiber which avoids the complexity that plagues most CPO systems that require multiple fibers significantly reducing fiber coupling issues.

pro.text: 该激光器可编程的特点为其提供了灵活性，能够针对不同类型的工作负载提供相应波长，以满足不同的带宽和距离需求。值得注意的是，他们的方案仅需一个激光器，而现有的共封装光学（Co-packaged Optics，CPO）方案则需要多个高功耗激光器。此外，所有波长均通过单根光纤传输，避免了大多数CPO系统因需多根光纤而产生的复杂性，显著减少了光纤耦合问题。

paragraphs.source: Unlike other CPO vendors that focus on bookended solutions, Ranovus focuses on developing interoperable systems and focuses on Ethernet standard interoperability as their key differentiator. They demonstrated their 8x100G DR8 optical interoperability at OCP 2024 in partnership with MediaTek - showing interoperability with standard 8x100G pluggable module from various third party suppliers.

paragraphs.source: Ranovus’ go to market is centered around providing the interoperable solutions that customers want. paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Ranovus’ go to market is centered around providing the interoperable solutions that customers want. pro.text: Ranovus的上市策略以提供客户所需的互操作解决方案为核心。目前这意味着100G PAM4 DR光器件，但微环谐振器调制技术的采用为其转向其他方案打开了通道，例如采用56 Gbaud NRZ，并通过波分复用（WDM）结合4个波长，在每对光纤上实现400G传输。

paragraphs.source: Scintil’s main product is LEAF Light, a Photonic System-on-Chip (PSoC) that can be delivered in die format (KGD) or assembled in modules, integrating 8 or 16 lasers of different colors spaced at 200 GHz or 100 GHz intervals, enabling multiple wavelengths to be carried on a single fiber through DWDM. They have developed electronic controls that would allow them to accurately maintain 100 GHz or 200 GHz spacing between wavelengths, even under temperature variation. There is a package reference design for an ELSFP module – similar to an OSFP – defined by the OIF, making it easier for customers to integrate this external laser source. Scintil’s solution works well with co-packaged optics based on ring modulators.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Scintil’s main product is LEAF Light, a Photonic System-on-Chip (PSoC) that can be delivered in die format (KGD) or assembled in modules, integrating 8 or 16 lasers of different colors spaced at 200 GHz or 100 GHz intervals, enabling multiple wavelengths to be carried on a single fiber through DWDM. They have developed electronic controls that would allow them to accurately maintain 100 GHz or 200 GHz spacing between wavelengths, even under temperature variation. There is a package reference design for an ELSFP module – similar to an OSFP – defined by the OIF, making it easier for customers to integrate this external laser source. Scintil’s solution works well with co-packaged optics based on ring modulators.

They have developed electronic controls that would allow them to accurately maintain 100 GHz or 200 GHz spacing between wavelengths, even under temperature variation. There is a package reference design for an ELSFP module – similar to an OSFP – defined by the OIF, making it easier for customers to integrate this external laser source. Scintil’s solution works well with co-packaged optics based on ring modulators.

pro.text: Scintil的主要产品是LEAF Light，这是一款光子系统级芯片（PSoC），可提供裸芯片（KGD）或已组装模块形式。该芯片集成了8或16个不同颜色的激光器，波长间隔为200 GHz或100 GHz，能够通过DWDM在一根光纤上传输多个波长。他们开发了电子控制技术，即使在温度变化的情况下，也能精确维持100 GHz或200 GHz的波长间隔。Scintil提供了一个符合OIF定义的外部激光源（External Laser Source, ELS）模块封装参考设计（类似于OSFP），便于客户集成这种外部激光源。其方案与采用环形调制器的共封装光学（CPO）兼容性良好。

paragraphs.source: Scintil’s process is called SHIP (Scintil Heterogeneous Integrated Photonics). The essence of the technology is to integrate III-V lasers onto standard silicon photonics in a wafer-level process. The process begins with a standard silicon photonics wafer – complete with waveguides, detectors, and mux/demux – fabricated using a conventional foundry flow. The wafer is then flipped and bonded to a new handle, allowing the original substrate to be removed and revealing the buried oxide layer. Unpatterned III–V material is subsequently bonded onto this newly exposed surface. The III-V is then patterned with lithography and etched to fabricate lasers, resulting in a monolithically integrated silicon photonics chip with on-board lasers.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Scintil’s process is called SHIP (Scintil Heterogeneous Integrated Photonics). The essence of the technology is to integrate III-V lasers onto standard silicon photonics in a wafer-level process. The process begins with a standard silicon photonics wafer – complete with waveguides, detectors, and mux/demux – fabricated using a conventional foundry flow. The wafer is then flipped and bonded to a new handle, allowing the original substrate to be removed and revealing the buried oxide layer. Unpatterned III–V material is subsequently bonded onto this newly exposed surface. The III-V is then patterned with lithography and etched to fabricate lasers, resulting in a monolithically integrated silicon photonics chip with on-board lasers. This contrasts with traditional InP-based lasers patterned using E-beam writers, where achieving precise wavelength control for DWDM can be more challenging, making it difficult to support tightly spaced channels.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Scintil’s process is called SHIP (Scintil Heterogeneous Integrated Photonics). The essence of the technology is to integrate III-V lasers onto standard silicon photonics in a wafer-level process. The process begins with a standard silicon photonics wafer – complete with waveguides, detectors, and mux/demux – fabricated using a conventional foundry flow. The wafer is then flipped and bonded to a new handle, allowing the original substrate to be removed and revealing the buried oxide layer. Unpatterned III–V material is subsequently bonded onto this newly exposed surface. The III-V is then patterned with lithography and etched to fabricate lasers, resulting in a monolithically integrated silicon photonics chip with on-board lasers. This contrasts with traditional InP-based lasers patterned using E-beam writers, where achieving precise wavelength control for DWDM can be more challenging, making it difficult to support tightly spaced channels.

pro.text: Scintil的工艺称为SHIP（Scintil异质集成光子技术）。其技术核心是在标准硅光子晶圆上通过晶圆级工艺集成III-V激光器。该工艺首先使用常规晶圆代工厂流程制作包含波导、探测器和复用/解复用器的标准硅光子晶圆，随后将晶圆翻转并键合到新的载体上，去除原始衬底并露出埋氧化层。之后将未图形的III-V材料键合到新暴露的表面，再通过光刻和刻蚀将其图形化以制作激光器，最终形成单片集成且带有片上激光器的硅光子芯片。

paragraphs.source: Developing a DWDM DFB laser array is challenging because each wavelength’s frequency must be precisely generated. To achieve a 100 GHz channel separation, the advanced capabilities of silicon photonics foundries and photolithographic processes shall be leveraged to accurately and repeatedly pattern the grating in silicon. Moreover, because the lasers are produced at the wafer level, hundreds of devices can be fabricated on each wafer, enabling high-volume and scalable production.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Developing a DWDM DFB laser array is challenging because each wavelength’s frequency must be precisely generated. To achieve a 100 GHz channel separation, the advanced capabilities of silicon photonics foundries and photolithographic processes shall be leveraged to accurately and repeatedly pattern the grating in silicon. Moreover, because the lasers are produced at the wafer level, hundreds of devices can be fabricated on each wafer, enabling high-volume and scalable production.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Developing a DWDM DFB laser array is challenging because each wavelength’s frequency must be precisely generated. To achieve a 100 GHz channel separation, the advanced capabilities of silicon photonics foundries and photolithographic processes shall be leveraged to accurately and repeatedly pattern the grating in silicon. Moreover, because the lasers are produced at the wafer level, hundreds of devices can be fabricated on each wafer, enabling high-volume and scalable production.

pro.text: 开发DWDM DFB激光器阵列极具挑战性，因为每个波长的频率都必须精确产生。为了实现100 GHz的通道间隔，需要充分利用硅光子晶圆代工厂的先进能力和光刻工艺，在硅中精确且重复地刻出光栅。此外，由于激光器是在晶圆级制造的，每片晶圆可生产数百个器件，从而实现高产量和规模化生产。

paragraphs.source: One key advantage of Scintil’s solution is power efficiency. The Scintil solution can generate and multiplex multiple colours (8 or 16) on single chip, unlike solutions using multiple discrete lasers along a combiner splitter, which require very high-power lasers to achieve the target power per multiplexed color. The Scintil solution offers superior power efficiency and increased bandwidth density, while halving the energy required for each transmitted bit. This is in comparison to existing co-packaged solutions, (including what Nvidia is currently adopting for Q3450 CPO switches), which use a single wavelength with high modulation speed rather than multiple wavelengths with low modulation speed.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: One key advantage of Scintil’s solution is power efficiency. The Scintil solution can generate and multiplex multiple colours (8 or 16) on single chip, unlike solutions using multiple discrete lasers along a combiner splitter, which require very high-power lasers to achieve the target power per multiplexed color. The Scintil solution offers superior power efficiency and increased bandwidth density, while halving the energy required for each transmitted bit. This is in comparison to existing co-packaged solutions, (including what Nvidia is currently adopting for Q3450 CPO switches), which use a single wavelength with high modulation speed rather than multiple wavelengths with low modulation speed.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: One key advantage of Scintil’s solution is power efficiency. The Scintil solution can generate and multiplex multiple colours (8 or 16) on single chip, unlike solutions using multiple discrete lasers along a combiner splitter, which require very high-power lasers to achieve the target power per multiplexed color. The Scintil solution offers superior power efficiency and increased bandwidth density, while halving the energy required for each transmitted bit. This is in comparison to existing co-packaged solutions, (including what Nvidia is currently adopting for Q3450 CPO switches), which use a single wavelength with high modulation speed rather than multiple wavelengths with low modulation speed.

pro.text: Scintil方案的一个重要优势在于功率效率。该方案能够在单芯片上生成并复用多个波长（8或16个），而采用多个分立激光器加合束器的方案则需要极高功率的激光器才能达到复用后每个颜色的目标功率。相比之下，Scintil解决方案具有更高的功率效率和带宽密度，同时使每个传输比特的能耗减半。这与现有的共封装光学（CPO）方案（包括英伟达目前在Q3450 CPO交换机中采用的方案）形成对比，后者使用单波长配合高调制速率，而不是采用多个波长配合较低调制速率。

paragraphs.source: Nvidia’s X800-Q3450 CPO switch features 115.2T total throughput and is designed for use with the scale-out network. The initial version will use 72 optical engines each operating at 1.6Tbit/s; later versions will likely transition to 36 optical engines at 3.2Tbit/s each, costing ~$1,000 per unit (including FAUs). As a result, the total BOM cost for the optical engines amounts to around $35-40k (for the 3.2T OE version).

The initial version will use 72 optical engines each operating at 1.6Tbit/s; later versions will likely transition to 36 optical engines at 3.2Tbit/s each, costing ~$1,000 per unit (including FAUs). As a result, the total BOM cost for the optical engines amounts to around $35-40k (for the 3.2T OE version).

As a result, the total BOM cost for the optical engines amounts to around $35-40k (for the 3.2T OE version).

pro.text:
**修订后的译文：**

英伟达X800-Q3450共封装光学（Co-packaged Optics，CPO）交换机总吞吐量达115.2 Tbit/s，专为横向扩展网络设计。其初始版本将采用72个光引擎（Optical Engine，OE），每个速率为1.6 Tbit/s；后续版本预计将过渡到36个光引擎，每个速率为3.2 Tbit/s，每个光引擎成本约为1000美元（含光纤阵列单元（Fiber Array Unit，FAU））。因此，光引擎的物料清单（BOM）总成本约为3.5万至4万美元（按3.2T版本计算）。

paragraphs.source: The Nvidia X800-Q3450 CPO switch uses 18 ELS modules for laser sources, with each containing 8 Continuous Wave (CW) DFB laser chips. CPO systems need to use relatively higher-power laser sources, with each CWDFB chip delivering ~350mW of power.

pro.text: 英伟达X800-Q3450共封装光学（CPO）交换机采用18个外部激光源（ELS）模块作为激光源，每个模块内含8颗连续波（CW）DFB激光芯片。CPO系统需使用功率较高的激光源，每颗连续波DFB激光芯片可输出约350mW功率。

paragraphs.source: Key industry players capable of producing CW laser units include Broadcom (U.S.), Furukawa (Japan), Lumentum (U.S.), Coherent (U.S.), Yuanjie (China), and Shijia (China). Lumentum, Coherent, Furukawa and Broadcom usually charge higher prices than Chinese vendors (Yuanjie and Shijia). We expect Lumentum to be the sole supplier for Nvidia’s initial batches of CPO switch shipments, and Coherent may enter as the second supplier in late 2026. Chinese manufacturers could see opportunities down the road, as CW laser sources are considered relatively standardized and commoditized in general, but there is still somewhat of a moat around building the high power laser sources that are required for CPO applications.

pro.text:
**修订后的译文：**

能够生产连续波（CW）激光器组件的主要业界厂商包括美国博通、日本古河电气、美国朗美通、相干，以及中国源杰科技和仕佳光子。朗美通、相干、古河电气和博通的定价通常高于中国厂商。中国厂商未来有望获得机会，因为CW激光光源总体已趋于标准化和商品化，不过CPO应用所需的高功率激光光源仍具有一定技术壁垒。

预计朗美通将作为英伟达首批共封装光学（CPO）交换机出货的独家供应商，相干则可能在二〇二六年底成为第二供应商。

paragraphs.source: FAUs are crucial passive components responsible for coupling optical fibers with the Optical Engine. High-quality FAUs and their precise alignment are critical to ensure optimal optical performance. One current challenge in the FAU assembly process is that the testing equipment used to measure coupling loss cannot yet be fully automated. As a result, the testing process still relies heavily on manual labor, which slows down overall production speed and is more costly. Corning estimated an average 10-15 minutes per FAU testing for the Spectrum X CPO systems.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: FAUs are crucial passive components responsible for coupling optical fibers with the Optical Engine. High-quality FAUs and their precise alignment are critical to ensure optimal optical performance. One current challenge in the FAU assembly process is that the testing equipment used to measure coupling loss cannot yet be fully automated. As a result, the testing process still relies heavily on manual labor, which slows down overall production speed and is more costly. Corning estimated an average 10-15 minutes per FAU testing for the Spectrum X CPO systems.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: FAUs are crucial passive components responsible for coupling optical fibers with the Optical Engine. High-quality FAUs and their precise alignment are critical to ensure optimal optical performance. One current challenge in the FAU assembly process is that the testing equipment used to measure coupling loss cannot yet be fully automated. As a result, the testing process still relies heavily on manual labor, which slows down overall production speed and is more costly. Corning estimated an average 10-15 minutes per FAU testing for the Spectrum X CPO systems.

pro.text: 光纤阵列单元（FAU）是关键的无源组件，负责将光纤与光引擎（Optical Engine，OE）进行耦合。高品质的FAU及其精确对准对于确保优异光学性能至关重要。目前FAU组装过程中的一大挑战是，用于测量耦合损耗的测试设备尚无法完全自动化。因此，测试过程仍高度依赖人工，导致整体生产速度放缓且成本增加。康宁估计，针对Spectrum X CPO系统的每个FAU测试平均需要十至十五分钟。

paragraphs.source: Apart from materials and component costs, labor is a big part of FAU cost – skilled labor is essential to ensure high quality assembly and alignment of fibers in the FAU units. Each 1.6T OE on the X800-Q3450 has an FAU with 20 fibers: 8 transmit, 8 receive and 4 for the external laser. Per system that is a total of 1,440 fibers, including 1152 for Tx/Rx.

Each 1.6T OE on the X800-Q3450 has an FAU with 20 fibers: 8 transmit, 8 receive and 4 for the external laser. Per system that is a total of 1,440 fibers, including 1152 for Tx/Rx.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Apart from materials and component costs, labor is a big part of FAU cost – skilled labor is essential to ensure high quality assembly and alignment of fibers in the FAU units. Each 1.6T OE on the X800-Q3450 has an FAU with 20 fibers: 8 transmit, 8 receive and 4 for the external laser. Per system that is a total of 1,440 fibers, including 1152 for Tx/Rx.

pro.text: 除了材料和元件成本外，人工也是FAU成本的大头——熟练工是确保FAU单元内光纤高质量组装与对准的关键。X800-Q3450上的每个1.6T光引擎（OE）配备一个含20根光纤的FAU：8根发送、8根接收、4根用于外部激光器。单系统总计1440根光纤，其中1152根用于Tx/Rx。

paragraphs.source: The leading companies in FAU are TFC Optical (300394.SH), Senko (9069.JP), and FOCI (3363.TW). TFC has a strong chance of supplying FAUs for the X800-Q3450 CPO switch, while Senko is regarded as the very likely candidate for both the Spectrum X CPOs and Broadcom’s Tomahawk 6 CPO systems. FOCI, meanwhile, is likely to focus more on Nvidia’s large-up CPO solutions.

paragraphs.source: Senko has a signature SEAT (Senko Elastic Averaging Technology) platform where they offer detachable FAU solutions for CPO systems. The company is collaborating closely with GFS on edge-coupling technology, integrating Senko mirrors directly into the wafer trenches. This approach enables wafer-level testing for edge coupling, which has been a key advantage for grating-coupling so far.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Senko has a signature SEAT (Senko Elastic Averaging Technology) platform where they offer detachable FAU solutions for CPO systems. The company is collaborating closely with GFS on edge-coupling technology, integrating Senko mirrors directly into the wafer trenches. This approach enables wafer-level testing for edge coupling, which has been a key advantage for grating-coupling so far.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Senko has a signature SEAT (Senko Elastic Averaging Technology) platform where they offer detachable FAU solutions for CPO systems. The company is collaborating closely with GFS on edge-coupling technology, integrating Senko mirrors directly into the wafer trenches. This approach enables wafer-level testing for edge coupling, which has been a key advantage for grating-coupling so far.

pro.text: Senko拥有其标志性的SEAT（Senko弹性平均技术）平台，可为CPO系统提供可拆卸的FAU解决方案。该公司正与GFS密切合作开发边缘耦合技术，将Senko反射镜直接集成到晶圆沟槽中。这种方法实现了边缘耦合的晶圆级测试，而晶圆级测试一直是光栅耦合迄今所拥有的关键优势。

paragraphs.source: SiPho chips feature waveguide channels at the micron scale, each requiring precise alignment with the light coming out of the entering the systems. Thus, coupling machines with exceptionally high accuracy are needed during the processes. FiconTEC (Germany) currently leads the industry in providing high-precision coupling machines. Their machines can be sold at over $300k per unit; yet they are still highly sought after by clients for their superior accuracy. Meanwhile, All Ring Tech (Taiwan) also provides automated fiber attach equipment. The company has devoted c.10% of its workforce to the space and expects its coupling equipment revenue to gain traction starting in 2026.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: SiPho chips feature waveguide channels at the micron scale, each requiring precise alignment with the light coming out of the entering the systems. Thus, coupling machines with exceptionally high accuracy are needed during the processes. FiconTEC (Germany) currently leads the industry in providing high-precision coupling machines. Their machines can be sold at over $300k per unit; yet they are still highly sought after by clients for their superior accuracy. Meanwhile, All Ring Tech (Taiwan) also provides automated fiber attach equipment. The company has devoted c.10% of its workforce to the space and expects its coupling equipment revenue to gain traction starting in 2026. Lastly, GMT Global (Taiwan) designs FAU bonding, alignment, and inspection machines that correct the wavelength of light to ensure accurate transmission via the FAU. The company aims to price its machines ~75% lower than comparable Japanese machines, whose price typically charge $200–250K. The firm expects to have some pile runs in Q4 2025.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: SiPho chips feature waveguide channels at the micron scale, each requiring precise alignment with the light coming out of the entering the systems. Thus, coupling machines with exceptionally high accuracy are needed during the processes. FiconTEC (Germany) currently leads the industry in providing high-precision coupling machines. Their machines can be sold at over $300k per unit; yet they are still highly sought after by clients for their superior accuracy. Meanwhile, All Ring Tech (Taiwan) also provides automated fiber attach equipment. The company has devoted c.10% of its workforce to the space and expects its coupling equipment revenue to gain traction starting in 2026. Lastly, GMT Global (Taiwan) designs FAU bonding, alignment, and inspection machines that correct the wavelength of light to ensure accurate transmission via the FAU. The company aims to price its machines ~75% lower than comparable Japanese machines, whose price typically charge $200–250K. The firm expects to have some pile runs in Q4 2025.

pro.text: SiPho芯片的波导通道为微米量级，每条通道均需与入射光精准对准。因此，工艺过程中必须采用极高精度的耦合设备。目前，德国FiconTEC在高精度耦合设备领域独占鳌头。其设备单价超过30万美元，却仍因精度卓越而备受客户追捧。与此同时，台湾全环科技（All Ring Tech）亦提供自动化光纤贴附设备。该公司已将约10%的劳动力投入该领域，并预计其耦合设备营收自2026年起将显著增长。

Meanwhile, All Ring Tech (Taiwan) also provides automated fiber attach equipment. The company has devoted c.10% of its workforce to the space and expects its coupling equipment revenue to gain traction starting in 2026. Lastly, GMT Global (Taiwan) designs FAU bonding, alignment, and inspection machines that correct the wavelength of light to ensure accurate transmission via the FAU. The company aims to price its machines ~75% lower than comparable Japanese machines, whose price typically charge $200–250K. The firm expects to have some pile runs in Q4 2025.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: SiPho chips feature waveguide channels at the micron scale, each requiring precise alignment with the light coming out of the entering the systems. Thus, coupling machines with exceptionally high accuracy are needed during the processes. FiconTEC (Germany) currently leads the industry in providing high-precision coupling machines. Their machines can be sold at over $300k per unit; yet they are still highly sought after by clients for their superior accuracy. Meanwhile, All Ring Tech (Taiwan) also provides automated fiber attach equipment. The company has devoted c.10% of its workforce to the space and expects its coupling equipment revenue to gain traction starting in 2026. Lastly, GMT Global (Taiwan) designs FAU bonding, alignment, and inspection machines that correct the wavelength of light to ensure accurate transmission via the FAU. The company aims to price its machines ~75% lower than comparable Japanese machines, whose price typically charge $200–250K. The firm expects to have some pile runs in Q4 2025.

pro.text: 最后，台湾GMT环球（GMT Global）设计了FAU键合、对准与检测设备，能够校正光波波长，确保通过FAU准确传输。该公司计划将其设备定价较同类日本设备低约75%，后者典型售价为20万至25万美元，并预计2025年第四季度进行小批量试产。

paragraphs.source: In the case of Nvidia’s X800-Q3450 CPO switch, more than 1,000 optical fibers emerge from the OEs, so a shuffle box is needed to organize them and route them to their destinations. Traditionally, this shuffle box alignment process was done manually, with technicians physically arranging the fibers. However, some leading companies have developed automated machines capable of performing the alignment with higher accuracy and efficiency.

pro.text: 以英伟达X800-Q3450共封装光学（CPO）交换机为例，从光引擎（OE）中会引出超过1000根光纤，因此需要使用光纤洗牌盒（shuffle box）来整理并将它们路由到各自目的地。不过，部分领先企业已开发出自动化对准设备，能够以更高精度和效率完成这一工作。

paragraphs.source: The price of a shuffle box is typically linked to the number of fibers it manages. For example, T&S Communications sells a 48-fiber shuffle box for ~$150, a 300-fiber version for ~$1,000, and a 500-fiber model for ~$1,600. For the X800-Q3450 with thousands of fibers, the shuffle box would cost Nvidia more than $3,000 to procure. The primary BOM components in a shuffle box include MT ferrules and fibers.

pro.text: 光纤洗牌盒的价格通常与其管理的光纤数量直接挂钩。例如，T&S通讯销售的48芯洗牌盒约为150美元，300芯版本约为1000美元，500芯型号约为1600美元。对于拥有数千根光纤的X800-Q3450而言，英伟达采购该洗牌盒的成本将超过3000美元。洗牌盒的主要BOM组件包括MT插芯和光纤。

paragraphs.source: T&S Communications (300570.SH) is a leading player in the shuffle box industry. The company has developed automated machines to align fibers within shuffle boxes. The technologies are patented, and it may take time and additional costs for competitors to bypass them. T&S’s major customer is Corning, and the two companies often work in tandem to serve clients. For instance, Corning helps clients (Nvidia, Broadcom, etc.) to design the fiber networks for their CPO solutions, and subcontract the shuffle box part to T&S.

paragraphs.source: On the outskirts of the shuffle box, there are MPO connectors, which connect fibers housed within the shuffle box to an external port. Fiber Optic MPO cables can then plug into this port to connect the switch with other distant switches or to distant NICs. The manufacturing process of MPO connectors primarily involves injection molding, vacuum adhesive filling, and fiber threading of the MT ferrules inside the unit. For the X-800 Q3450 CPO switch, there are 144 MPO connectors needed.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: On the outskirts of the shuffle box, there are MPO connectors, which connect fibers housed within the shuffle box to an external port. Fiber Optic MPO cables can then plug into this port to connect the switch with other distant switches or to distant NICs. The manufacturing process of MPO connectors primarily involves injection molding, vacuum adhesive filling, and fiber threading of the MT ferrules inside the unit. For the X-800 Q3450 CPO switch, there are 144 MPO connectors needed.

Fiber Optic MPO cables can then plug into this port to connect the switch with other distant switches or to distant NICs. The manufacturing process of MPO connectors primarily involves injection molding, vacuum adhesive filling, and fiber threading of the MT ferrules inside the unit. For the X-800 Q3450 CPO switch, there are 144 MPO connectors needed.

pro.text: 在洗牌盒外围设有MPO连接器，用于将盒内光纤连至外部端口。随后可将光纤MPO线缆插入该端口，把交换机与其他远端交换机或远端网卡（NIC）连接起来。MPO连接器的主要制造工艺包括注塑成型、真空灌胶以及MT插芯的光纤穿入。对于X-800 Q3450共封装光学（CPO）交换机，共需使用144个MPO连接器。

paragraphs.source: MT ferrules are critical components used in FAUs, shuffle boxes, as well as MPO connectors. They are used to align multiple fibers in a parallel manner. Many companies can manufacture MT ferrules, including US Conec (U.S.), T&S (China), Senko (Japan), Fukushima (Japan), FOCI (Taiwan), Sumitomo (Japan), and TFC (China). MT ferrules are not particularly difficult to manufacture, but achieving the required precision and robustness still needs a lot of engineering. Companies compete on molding capabilities for producing ferrules that minimize insertion loss during fiber connections.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: MT ferrules are critical components used in FAUs, shuffle boxes, as well as MPO connectors. They are used to align multiple fibers in a parallel manner. Many companies can manufacture MT ferrules, including US Conec (U.S.), T&S (China), Senko (Japan), Fukushima (Japan), FOCI (Taiwan), Sumitomo (Japan), and TFC (China). MT ferrules are not particularly difficult to manufacture, but achieving the required precision and robustness still needs a lot of engineering. Companies compete on molding capabilities for producing ferrules that minimize insertion loss during fiber connections.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: MT ferrules are critical components used in FAUs, shuffle boxes, as well as MPO connectors. They are used to align multiple fibers in a parallel manner. Many companies can manufacture MT ferrules, including US Conec (U.S.), T&S (China), Senko (Japan), Fukushima (Japan), FOCI (Taiwan), Sumitomo (Japan), and TFC (China). MT ferrules are not particularly difficult to manufacture, but achieving the required precision and robustness still needs a lot of engineering. Companies compete on molding capabilities for producing ferrules that minimize insertion loss during fiber connections.

pro.text: MT 插芯是 FAU、光纤洗牌盒以及 MPO 连接器中的关键组件，用于以平行方式对齐多根光纤。多家公司能够生产 MT 插芯，包括 US Conec（美国）、T&S（中国）、Senko（日本）、Fukushima（日本）、FOCI（台湾）、Sumitomo（日本）以及 TFC（中国）。MT 插芯制造难度并不特别大，但要同时实现所需的精度和可靠性，仍需投入大量工程努力。各厂商主要在注塑成型能力上展开竞争，以生产出能将光纤连接插入损耗降至最低的插芯。

paragraphs.source: Among these firms, US Conec also has over three decades of experience developing the technology, and is expected to be one of the major suppliers for Nvidia’s Q3450 CPO systems. Fukushima also has strong mold design and manufacturing capabilities, allowing it to produce high-quality MT ferrules at competitive prices. Meanwhile, FOCI, TFC, and T&S primarily produce MT ferrules for their own in-house FAUs and shuffle boxes – the rationale is to vertically integrate as much of the process as possible to enhance quality control and cost efficiency.

Meanwhile, FOCI, TFC, and T&S primarily produce MT ferrules for their own in-house FAUs and shuffle boxes – the rationale is to vertically integrate as much of the process as possible to enhance quality control and cost efficiency.

Meanwhile, FOCI, TFC, and T&S primarily produce MT ferrules for their own in-house FAUs and shuffle boxes – the rationale is to vertically integrate as much of the process as possible to enhance quality control and cost efficiency.

pro.text: 在这些厂商中，US Conec 拥有超过三十年的技术开发经验，预计将成为英伟达 Q3450 CPO 系统的重要供应商之一。福岛在模具设计和制造方面也具备较强实力，能够以具有竞争力的价格生产高质量 MT 插芯。与此同时，FOCI、TFC 和 T&S 主要为自己内部的 FAU 和光纤洗牌盒生产 MT 插芯，目的是通过垂直整合尽可能多的环节，以加强质量控制并降低成本。

sections.title: Manufacturing, Assembling, and the Testing Processes

paragraphs.source: OE fabrication: As discussed above, TSMC will play a crucial role in fabricating the PICs, EICs and integrating them and of the CPO system. Their COUPE platform appears to be the solution of choice for next generation CPO endpoints. Global Foundries, and Tower are the foundries who have strong SiPho capabilities, but their lack of leading edge CMOS and advanced packaging constrain their ability to provide the higher bandwidth OEs of the future.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: **OE fabrication**: As discussed above, TSMC will play a crucial role in fabricating the PICs, EICs and integrating them and of the CPO system. Their COUPE platform appears to be the solution of choice for next generation CPO endpoints. Global Foundries, and Tower are the foundries who have strong SiPho capabilities, but their lack of leading edge CMOS and advanced packaging constrain their ability to provide the higher bandwidth OEs of the future.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: OE fabrication: As discussed above, TSMC will play a crucial role in fabricating the PICs, EICs and integrating them and of the CPO system. Their COUPE platform appears to be the solution of choice for next generation CPO endpoints. Global Foundries, and Tower are the foundries who have strong SiPho capabilities, but their lack of leading edge CMOS and advanced packaging constrain their ability to provide the higher bandwidth OEs of the future.

pro.text: 光引擎（Optical Engine，OE）制造: 如前所述，台积电将在PIC、EIC的制造以及CPO系统的集成过程中发挥关键作用。其COUPE平台似乎已成为下一代CPO端点的优先解决方案。Global Foundries和Tower虽然拥有较强的SiPho工艺能力，但由于缺乏领先的CMOS工艺和先进封装技术，限制了它们提供未来更高带宽OE器件的能力。

paragraphs.source: Advanced packaging: Outsourced Semiconductor Assembly and Test (OSAT) providers will focus on the back-end processes: including OE packaging, OE testing, and system packaging (laser and coupler integration & testing).
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: **Advanced packaging**: Outsourced Semiconductor Assembly and Test (OSAT) providers will focus on the back-end processes: including OE packaging, OE testing, and system packaging (laser and coupler integration & testing).

pro.text: 先进封装：外包半导体组装与测试（OSAT）供应商将专注于后段制程，包括OE封装、OE测试以及系统级封装（激光器与耦合器集成及测试）。

paragraphs.source: Other notable names are Fabrinet ($FN), TFC Optical (300394.SH), and Foxconn (2354.TW). Fabrinet has long served as the module assembler for Nvidia’s in-house optical module units and is now actively building capabilities in OE packaging, testing, and full system assembly. Fabrinet is also viewed as one of the potential candidates for Broadcom’s CPO system assembly work, alongside Micas and Foxconn.

Fabrinet is also viewed as one of the potential candidates for Broadcom’s CPO system assembly work, alongside Micas and Foxconn.

pro.text:
**修订后的译文：**
其他值得关注的企业包括 Fabrinet（$FN）、TFC Optical（300394.SH）和鸿海（2354.TW）。Fabrinet长期担任英伟达自有光模块的组装厂商，目前正积极扩展OE封装、测试及完整系统组装能力。Fabrinet也被视为博通CPO系统组装工作的潜在候选者之一，与Micas和鸿海并列。

paragraphs.source: Electro-optical (E/O) testing equipment: During the testing process, the service vendors mentioned above use electro-optical (E/O) testing tools to ensure system reliability. However, the industry is still developing and has yet to fully converge on a standardized testing methodology for photonic engines. Each vendor is developing various solutions to gain a foothold in this emerging space.

Each vendor is developing various solutions to gain a foothold in this emerging space.

pro.text: 电光（E/O）测试设备：在测试环节，上述服务供应商会使用电光（E/O）测试工具来确保系统可靠性。然而，该行业仍在发展中，尚未就光子引擎的标准化测试方法达成共识。各厂商都在开发不同解决方案，以期在这个新兴领域站稳脚跟。

paragraphs.source: Other key equipment providers in the CPO supply chain include Keysight, Ficontec, Teradyne, Advantest, FormFactor, Chroma, Anritsu, and Multilane. Among them, Keysight is a large player in the field - they are known for providing high-speed testing equipment with premium quality (and premium price!). For example, they recently announced two new oscilloscopes for 1.6T optical transceiver testing. Due to their position in the market, they can well benefit from the CPO trend.

paragraphs.source: Ficontec has a strong foundation in photonics testing and is now also actively expanding its electrical testing capabilities. One of its key strengths is wafer-level photonic testing – which improves the efficiency of the traditionally inefficient photonic testing process. For example, the company recently introduced a new high-throughput wafer-level testing tool for PICs, compatible with existing semi ATE architecture. The machine is claimed as the industry’s first double-sided wafer testing machine. In addition to testing equipment, Ficontec also provides FAU assembly and coupling machines, which we’ll explore in more detail in the next section.

inline_elements.text: recently introduced a new high-throughput wafer-level testing tool for PICs

paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Ficontec has a strong foundation in photonics testing and is now also actively expanding its electrical testing capabilities. One of its key strengths is wafer-level photonic testing – which improves the efficiency of the traditionally inefficient photonic testing process. For example, the company [recently introduced a new high-throughput wafer-level testing tool for PICs](https://www.ficontec.com/ficontec-releases-innovative-wafer-level-test-cell-to-complement-existing-ate/), compatible with existing semi ATE architecture. The machine is claimed as the industry’s first double-sided wafer testing machine. In addition to testing equipment, Ficontec also provides FAU assembly and coupling machines, which we’ll explore in more detail in the next section.

pro.text: FiconTEC在光子测试领域拥有坚实基础，目前也在积极扩展其电气测试能力。其核心优势之一是晶圆级光子测试，能够显著提升传统上效率低下的光子测试流程。例如，该公司最近推出了一款适用于PIC的高吞吐量晶圆级测试设备，与现有的半导体ATE架构兼容。这台设备据称是业界首款双面晶圆测试机。除测试设备外，FiconTEC还提供FAU组装和耦合设备，我们将在下一节中更详细探讨。
